technology.title: I-VirtualMD.app ye-Advanced Health AI Technology
technology.description1: I-VirtualMD.app isebenzisa ii-algorithms ezintsha eziphuhliswe liqela lethu loogqirha abaqeqeshwe yi-Harvard kunye neengcali ze-AI ukuhambisa ulwazi lwezempilo oluchanekileyo. Iingcali zethu zezempilo ze-AI ziqeqeshelwe uncwadi lwezempilo olubanzi, izikhokelo zeklinikhi, kunye neemeko zezempilo zehlabathi zokwenyani ukuze zibonelele ngezimvo ezibonisa ngokusondeleyo ezo zeengcali eziqinisekiswe yibhodi.
technology.description2: Kuthelekiso olulawulwayo lwecala necala lokuchaneka koxilongo, inkqubo yethu ibonise ukusebenza okumangalisayo, isoloko ihambelana okanye igqithisa iingcinga zoogqirha abanamava. Abantu bethu be-AI banokuqhuba amawaka amaphepha ophando lwezempilo, izikhokelo, kunye neeprothokholi zeklinikhi ngemizuzwana-ukufikelela kulwazi olungaphaya kwayo nayiphi na enye ingcali yezempilo yoluntu enokugcina.
technology.description3: Ngelixa sizamela ukuchaneka okukhethekileyo kwaye neqela lethu liqhubeka liphucula inkqubo, iyeza lintsokothile kwaye iimeko zempilo zodwa zizodwa. Yiyo loo nto siyile iqonga lethu ukuba landise-lingathathi indawo-ubuchule obuxabisekileyo bababoneleli bezempilo abangabantu.

disclaimer.title: Sebenzisa Ngomngcipheko Wakho
disclaimer.description: Ulwazi olunikezwe yiVirtualMD.app kunye nengcali yezempilo ye-AI yenzelwe ulwazi kunye nemfundo kuphela. Ngokusebenzisa le nkonzo, uyavuma kwaye uyavuma ukuba:

points.mayContainErrors: Umxholo owenziwe yi-AI unokuqulatha iimpazamo okanye izinto ezishiyiweyo ngaphandle kwenkqubo yethu yokuqinisekisa eyomeleleyo
points.requiresEvaluation: Iingcebiso zonyango zifuna uvavanyo lomntu ngamnye ngababoneleli bezempilo abanelayisensi
points.mayBeOutdated: Ulwazi lwezempilo lusenokuphelelwa lixesha njengoko ulwazi lwezonyango lukhula
points.uniqueCircumstances: Imbali yakho yonyango eyodwa, iimeko, kunye neemeko zifuna uvavanyo lobuchwephesha

disclaimer.userResponsibility: Ngelixa iVirtualMD.app isebenzisa itekhnoloji entsonkothileyo ukuhambisa ulwazi oluxabisekileyo lwezonyango, abasebenzisi bathatha lonke uxanduva ngendlela abalusebenzisa ngayo olu lwazi.
disclaimer.missionStatement: Iqela leVirtualMD.app liphuhlise obu buchwepheshe kuba sikholelwa ekufikeleleni kwidemokhrasi kulwazi lwezonyango olukumgangatho wehlabathi kunye nokuxhasa izigqibo zempilo ezingcono. Inkqubo yethu ye-AI imele uhlaziyo oluqhubekayo kubuchwepheshe bolwazi lwezempilo oluthi, xa lusetyenziswa ngokufanelekileyo kunye nokhathalelo lobuchwephesha, lunokukunceda wenze ukhetho lwezempilo olunolwazi kwaye ube neencoko ezinemveliso ngakumbi nababoneleli bakho bezempilo. Ukungasebenzisi ubugcisa obuphucuke ngolo hlobo xa bufumaneka bekuya kuba lithuba langaphambili lokufumana ulwazi lwezonyango olunokutshintsha ubomi.

aboutEncyclopediaPage.title: VirtualMD.app Encyclopedia of Health and Wellness
aboutEncyclopediaPage.p1: Kwihlabathi lanamhlanje ledijithali, ulwazi oluninzi lwezempilo lusezandleni zethu, kodwa ukwahlula iingcebiso ezithembekileyo kulwazi olungeyonyani kunokongamela.
aboutEncyclopediaPage.p2: IVirtualMD.app Encyclopedia inqumla ingxolo, ibonelela ngendlela yoguqulo yokuzibandakanya nempilo yakho. Idityaniswe ngokukodwa kwiqonga lethu, ikuvumela ukuba ufikelele kulwazi olunzulu, olubhekiselele kwiijenali zezonyango ezihlonitshwayo ngaphandle kokushiya unxibelelwano lwakho ngqo neqela lethu leengcali ze-AI.
aboutEncyclopediaPage.p3: Le asiyonjini yokukhangela nje; licandelo eliqeqeshwe ngokukodwa "lophando olunzulu" elenzelwe ukuba libe sisixhobo sakho esithembekileyo ngexesha lencoko.
aboutEncyclopediaPage.p4: Khawufane ucinge ukuba ukwincoko nogqirha wentliziyo we-AI kunye nengcali yezondlo exoxa ngolawulo lwe-cholesterol. Igama elithi "statins" likhankanyiwe, kwaye ufuna ukuqonda ngaphezu kwezinto ezisisiseko. Endaweni yokumisa ingxoxo yakho ukukhangela i-intanethi evulekileyo, unokufikelela ngoko nangoko kwiVirtualMD.app Encyclopedia. Iza kubonelela ngesishwankathelo esibanzi, kodwa ekulula ukusiqonda sendlela amayeza asebenza ngayo, izibonelelo zawo, kunye neziphumo ebezingalindelekanga ezinokwenzeka, kunye nalo lonke ulwazi olufunyenwe kupapasho oluphononongwe ngoontanga njengeLancet okanye iNew England Journal of Medicine.

eligibility.ageRequirement: Ukusebenzisa iNkonzo yeVirtualMD.app, kufuneka ubuncinci ube neminyaka eyi-18 okanye ubudala bobuninzi obusemthethweni kwindawo yakho, nokuba yeyiphi enkulu. Ukuba usebenzisa iNkonzo egameni lombutho, umela kwaye uqinisekisa ukuba unegunya lokubophelela lo mbutho kule Miqathango, kwaye uyavuma ukubotshelelwa yile Miqathango egameni lalo mbutho.

section2.title: Ulwazi esiluqokelelayo kunye nezinye iinkcukacha zabucala
section2.content:
Ulwazi Esiluqokelelayo
   Siqokelela ulwazi osinika lona ngokuthe ngqo, ulwazi esiluqokelela ngokuzenzekelayo ngokusebenzisa kwakho iNkonzo, kunye nolwazi oluvela kwimithombo yomntu wesithathu.

Ulwazi ngeAkhawunti: Xa ubhalisa, siqokelela ulwazi olufana negama lakho, idilesi ye-imeyile kunye nenombolo yefowuni (ngeenjongo zokuqinisekisa).
Umxholo woMsebenzisi: Siqokelela ulwazi olunikezayo xa usebenzisa iNkonzo, kubandakanywa umbhalo ongeniswa kunxibelelwano lwengxoxo, ulwazi lweprofayili (njengoluhlu lwamayeza, ukuba lunikezelwe), kunye nengxelo.
Ulwazi Lokusetyenziswa: Siqokelela ngokuzenzekelayo ulwazi malunga nokusebenzisana kwakho neNkonzo, njengedilesi ye-IP, uhlobo lwebrawuza, ulwazi lwesixhobo, inkqubo yokusebenza, amaphepha ajongweyo, amakhonkco acofayo, kunye nemihla kunye namaxesha otyelelo lwakho.
Iikuki kunye nobuChwephesha obufanayo: Sisebenzisa iikuki kunye neetekhnoloji zokulandelela ezifanayo ukulandelela umsebenzi kwiNkonzo yethu kwaye sibambe ulwazi oluthile. Ungayalela isikhangeli sakho ukuba sale zonke iikuki okanye ubonise xa icookie ithunyelwa. Nangona kunjalo, ukuba awuzamkeli iikuki, usenokungakwazi ukusebenzisa ezinye iinxalenye zeNkonzo yethu.

Indlela Esilusebenzisa Ngayo Ulwazi
Sisebenzisa ulwazi esiluqokelelayo ngeenjongo ezahlukeneyo, kuquka:

Ukubonelela, sebenzisa, gcina, kwaye uphucule iNkonzo.
Inkqubo yentengiselwano kunye nokuthumela ulwazi oluhambelanayo, kubandakanywa iziqinisekiso kunye nee-invoyisi (ukuba ziyasebenza).
Thumela izaziso zobugcisa, uhlaziyo, izilumkiso zokhuseleko, kunye nenkxaso kunye nemiyalezo yolawulo.
Phendula kwizimvo zakho, imibuzo, kunye nezicelo kwaye unikezele ngenkonzo yabathengi.
Nxibelelana nawe malunga neemveliso, iinkonzo, izibonelelo, ukukhushulwa, imivuzo, kunye neziganeko ezinikezelwa yi-VirtualMD kunye nabanye, kwaye unike iindaba kunye nolwazi esicinga ukuba luya kuba nomdla kuwe (ngokuxhomekeke kumalungelo akho okuphuma).
Jonga kwaye uhlalutye iintsingiselo, ukusetyenziswa, kunye nemisebenzi ngokunxulumene neNkonzo yethu.
Ukukhangela, ukuphanda, kunye nokuthintela ukuthengiselana ngobuqhetseba kunye neminye imisebenzi engekho mthethweni kunye nokukhusela amalungelo kunye nepropati ye-VirtualMD kunye nabanye.
Yenza ngokwezifiso kwaye uphucule iNkonzo kwaye unikeze umxholo okanye iimpawu ezihambelana neeprofayili zabasebenzisi okanye umdla.
Ukuphucula ukuchaneka, ukusebenza kakuhle, kunye nokhuseleko lweemodeli zethu ze-AI kunye neempawu zeqonga usebenzisa idatha engaziwa kunye nehlanganisiweyo.
Yenza nayiphi na enye injongo echazwe kuwe ngexesha lokuqokelela ulwazi.

Indlela Esabelana Ngayo Ngolwazi

Nabathengisi kunye nabaBoneleli beNkonzo: Sinokwabelana ngolwazi kunye nabathengisi beqela lesithathu, abacebisi, kunye nabanye ababoneleli ngeenkonzo abafuna ukufikelela kulwazi olunjalo ukuze baqhube umsebenzi egameni lethu (umzekelo, ababoneleli bokusingatha, ababoneleli be-analytics, abaqhubekisi bentlawulo, ababoneleli be-AI API baqulunqwe ngokwemigaqo-nkqubo yethu yokusetyenziswa kwedatha).
Ekuphenduleni iNkqubo yoMthetho: Sinokuthi siveze ulwazi ukuba kufuneka senze njalo ngokomthetho okanye ngenkolelo efanelekileyo yokuba isenzo esinjalo siyimfuneko ukuthobela uxanduva lomthetho, ukukhusela nokukhusela amalungelo okanye ipropathi ye-VirtualMD, ukuthintela okanye ukuphanda ubugwenxa obunokwenzeka ngokunxulumene neNkonzo, ukukhusela ukhuseleko lobuqu lwabasebenzisi beNkonzo okanye uluntu, okanye ukukhusela ngokusemthethweni.
Ngemvume yakho: Sinokwabelana ngolwazi ngemvume yakho okanye ngokwesikhokelo sakho.
Uweliselo lweShishini: Sisenokwabelana okanye sidlulisele ulwazi ngokunxulumene, okanye ngexesha lothethathethwano, nakuphi na ukudityaniswa, ukuthengiswa kwee-asethi zenkampani, ukuxhasa ngemali, okanye ukufunyanwa kwayo yonke okanye inxalenye yeshishini lethu yenye inkampani.
Idatha eHlanganisiweyo okanye engachongwanga: Sinokwabelana ngolwazi oludityanisiweyo okanye olungachazwanga, olungenakusetyenziswa ngokufanelekileyo ukukuchonga.

Ukhetho lwakho lwabucala

Ugqithiso lweDatha lwamazwe ngamazwe

section5.title: Izenzo zoKhuseleko zeVirtualMD.app
section5.content:
Sisebenzisa isicwangciso sokhuseleko esinamanqanaba amaninzi:

Isinyanzelo kuzo zonke ii-akhawunti, ezifuna ukuqinisekiswa ngokusebenzisa into yesibini (umzekelo, ikhowudi kwi-imeyile / ifowuni).

Uqinisekiso Lwezinto Ezintathu (3FA) Ukhetho:
Ukhuseleko olongeziweyo ngokuzikhethela olufuna igama eliyimfihlo, ikhowudi ye-imeyile, KUNYE nekhowudi yeSMS.

La manyathelo abonelela ngokhuseleko oluluqilima lweakhawunti, kodwa khumbula ukuba akukho nkqubo ikhuselekile nge-100%.

section6.title: I-VirtualMD.app kunye neeNgqwalaselo ze-HIPAA (Ukuphindaphinda)
section6.content:

Abasebenzisi abafuna ukuthotyelwa kwe-HIPAA ngokungqongqo kwi-PHI abayilawulayo akufanele basebenzise iqonga lethu jikelele ngeenjongo ezinjalo ngaphandle kwe-BAA. Abasebenzisi akufanele bafake ulwazi olunokulandelwa kwizigulane ngamnye kumxholo ophula i-HIPAA ngaphandle kwemvume ecacileyo, enolwazi evumayo i-platform ye-non-HIPAA yokuthobela isimo sokusetyenziswa.

Utshintsho kule Miqathango kunye nePolisi
I-VirtualMD inelungelo, ngokokubona kwethu, ukuguqula okanye ukutshintsha le Miqathango kunye noMgaqo-nkqubo waBucala obandakanyiweyo nangaliphi na ixesha. Ukuba uhlaziyo luyinto ebonakalayo, siya kubonelela ngesaziso seentsuku ezingama-30 ubuncinci phambi kwayo nayiphi na imigaqo emitsha esebenzayo, enokunikezelwa nge-imeyile kwidilesi ehambelana neakhawunti yakho okanye ngokuthumela isaziso kwiNkonzo.

Yintoni eyenza utshintsho lwezinto eziphathekayo luya kugqitywa ngokubona kwethu.

Ngokuqhubeka nokufikelela okanye ukusebenzisa iNkonzo yethu emva kokuba naluphi na uhlaziyo lusebenza, uyavuma ukuba ubotshelelwe yimigaqo ehlaziyiweyo. Ukuba awuvumelani nemigaqo emitsha, awusagunyaziswanga ukusebenzisa iNkonzo kwaye kufuneka uyeke ukusebenzisa ngokukhawuleza.

Luxanduva lwakho ukujonga le Miqathango ngamaxesha athile ukuze wenze utshintsho.

Ukupheliswa
Ungayivala iakhawunti yakho kwaye uyeke ukusebenzisa iNkonzo nangaliphi na ixesha ngokulandela imiyalelo engaphakathi kwiNkonzo okanye uqhagamshelane nathi.

I-VirtualMD inokuthi, ngokubona kwayo, imise okanye iphelise ukufikelela kwakho kuyo yonke okanye inxalenye yeNkonzo, kunye okanye ngaphandle kwesaziso, ngaso nasiphi na isizathu, kubandakanywa, ngaphandle komda, ukwaphulwa kwale Miqathango. Izizathu zokuphelisa zingabandakanya, kodwa azikhawulelwanga, ukungasebenzi ixesha elide, izicelo zonyanzeliso lomthetho okanye ezinye ii-arhente zikarhulumente, ukupheliswa okanye ukuguqulwa kwezinto eziphathekayo zeNkonzo, okanye imiba engalindelekanga yobugcisa okanye yokhuseleko.

Emva kokupheliswa, ilungelo lakho lokusebenzisa iNkonzo liya kuphela ngokukhawuleza. Onke amalungiselelo eMiqathango enokuthi ngokwendalo yawo aphile ekuyekisweni aya kusinda ekuyekisweni, kubandakanywa, ngaphandle kwemida, amalungiselelo obunini, izibambiso zewaranti, imbuyekezo, kunye nemida yobutyala.

Asiyi kuba noxanduva kuwe okanye nakweliphi na iqela lesithathu ngalo naluphi na ukupheliswa kokufikelela kwakho kwiNkonzo.

UMthetho oLawulayo kunye noSombululo lweeMbano
Le Miqathango kunye nokusetyenziswa kwakho kweNkonzo kuya kulawulwa kwaye kucaciswe ngokuhambelana nemithetho yoManyano lwaseMassachusetts, eUnited States of America, ngaphandle kongquzulwano lwemigaqo yomthetho.

Uyavuma ukuba naliphi na inyathelo lomthetho okanye inkqubo ephuma okanye enxulumene nale Miqathango okanye iNkonzo iya kuziswa ngokukodwa kwiinkundla zomdibaniso okanye zelizwe eziseSuffolk County, Massachusetts, USA. Unika imvume kulawulo olukhethekileyo kunye nendawo yeenkundla ezinjalo kwaye uyasirhoxisa nasiphi na inkcaso malunga neforam engafanelekanga.

I-VirtualMD inokuthi, ngokubona kwayo, ifune ukuba ungenise naziphi na iimbambano ezivela kusetyenziso lwale Miqathango okanye iNkonzo, kubandakanywa iingxabano ezivela okanye malunga nokutolikwa kwazo, ukuphulwa, ukungasebenzi, ukungasebenzi, okanye ukupheliswa, ukuya ekugqibeleni kunye nokubophelela ulamlo phantsi kweMithetho yoLawulo lwe-American Arbitration Association esebenzisa umthetho waseMassachusetts.

Iinkcukacha zoqhakamshelwano
Ukuba unayo nayiphi na imibuzo malunga nale Miqathango okanye uMgaqo-nkqubo waBucala, nceda uqhagamshelane nathi ku: legal@virtualmd.app okanye uqhagamshelane nathi kwiphepha lethu.

Iintlobo ngeentlobo
IsiVumelwano sisonke
Le Miqathango kunye noMgaqo-nkqubo wethu waBucala zenza isivumelwano kunye nesiphelele phakathi kwakho kunye neVirtualMD Technologies, LLC malunga neNkonzo kwaye ithatha indawo yokuqonda kwangaphambili kunye nexesha langoku, izivumelwano, ukumelwa, kunye neziqinisekiso, zombini ezibhaliweyo kunye nezomlomo, malunga neNkonzo.

Ukuba ngqongqo
Ukuba naliphi na ilungiselelo lale Miqathango libanjwe yinkundla okanye esinye isigqeba esinegunya lokulawula ukuba alisebenzi, lingekho mthethweni, okanye linganyanzelisi ngaso nasiphi na isizathu, olo lungiselelo luya kupheliswa okanye luthintelwe kumlinganiselo ophantsi wokuba izibonelelo eziseleyo zeMiqathango ziya kuqhubeka zisebenza ngokupheleleyo kwaye zisebenze.

Ukurhoxisa
Akukho kurhoxiswa yi VirtualMD yalo naliphi na ixesha okanye imeko ebekiweyo kule Miqathango iya kuthathwa njengoyekelelo olongezelelweyo okanye oluqhubekayo lwelo gama okanye imeko okanye ukurhoxiswa kwaso nasiphi na esinye isigama okanye imeko, kwaye nakuphi na ukusilela kweVirtualMD ukumela ilungelo okanye ulungiselelo phantsi kwale Miqathango ayisayi kwenza ukurhoxiswa kwelungelo okanye ilungiselelo elinjalo.

Isabelo
Le Miqathango, kunye nawo nawaphi na amalungelo kunye neelayisensi ezinikwe apha ngezantsi, ayinakudluliselwa okanye yabelwa nguwe, kodwa inokwabelwa yiVirtualMD ngaphandle kwesithintelo.

Izihloko
Izihloko zecandelo ezisetyenziswe apha zenzelwe ukunceda kuphela kwaye aziyi kunikwa nayiphi na into esemthethweni.

Nje kancinci
I-VirtualMD ayisayi kuba noxanduva lwako nakuphi na ukusilela ukwenza izibophelelo zayo apha ngezantsi apho ukungaphumeleli okunjalo kubangela nasiphi na isizathu esingaphaya kolawulo olufanelekileyo lwe-VirtualMD, kubandakanywa, ngaphandle kokunciphisa, umatshini, i-elektroniki, okanye ukungaphumeleli konxibelelwano okanye ukuthotywa.
