privacyPledge.title: 1. ISithembiso saBucala sedatha yeVirtualMD.app
privacyPledge.intro: KwiVirtualMD.app, ubumfihlo kunye nokhuseleko lolwazi lwakho lobuqu lubaluleke kakhulu. Sizimisele ukugcina ubumfihlo kunye nokuthembeka kwedatha osiphathise yona. Iqonga lethu liyilwe ngamanyathelo okhuseleko olomeleleyo ukukhusela ulwazi lwakho ekufikeleleni okungagunyaziswanga, ukubhengezwa, ukuguqulwa, kunye nokutshatyalaliswa.

secureInfo.title: Sizama ukugcina ulwazi lwakho lukhuselekile.
secureInfo.description: Sisebenzisa iiprothokholi zofihlo zomgangatho woshishino lwedatha xa uhamba kwaye uphumle, ecaleni kokhuseleko lolwakhiwo olunemigangatho emininzi.

noPersonalUse.title: Asisebenzisi ulwazi lwakho ngayo nayiphi na indlela yokuchonga umntu ngeenjongo zangaphandle ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacileyo.
noPersonalUse.description: Unxibelelwano lwakho oluthe ngqo kunye neenkcukacha zobuqu zezakho wedwa.

neverSell.title: Asinakuze sithengise iinkcukacha zakho kubantu besithathu.
neverSell.description: Ukuthembela kwakho kubaluleke kakhulu, kwaye siyayixhasa le nto ngokuqinisekisa ukuba idatha yakho ayithengiswa.

anonymizedData.title: Siza kusebenzisa idatha yakho engaziwa ukuphucula inkqubo yethu.
anonymizedData.description: Ukuphucula ukuchaneka, ukusebenza kakuhle, kunye nokhuseleko lweemodeli zethu ze-AI kunye neempawu zeqonga, sisebenzisa idatha engazange yaziwe yaza yadityaniswa ngokungqongqo. Oku kuthetha ukuba zonke iinkcukacha ezichongiweyo (personal identifiable information) (PII) ziyasuswa, kwaye idatha isetyenziswa kwimo edityanisiweyo engavumeli ukuba kuchongwe nawuphi na umsebenzisi. Le nkqubo ibalulekile ekufundeni okuqhubekayo kunye nokuphuculwa kweenkonzo esizinikezela kubo bonke abasebenzisi.

securityLevels.title: 2. Ukuqonda amaNqanaba oKhuseleko lweDatha kunye ne-HIPAA

accountSecurity.title: Amanqanaba oKhuseleko lweAkhawunti
accountSecurity.description: Ukhuseleko lwedijithali luxhomekeke kumaleko ongqinisiso ukuze kuqinisekiswe ubuni bomsebenzisi. Ezi zinto zihlala zihlelwa njengezinto:
accountSecurity.sfaDescription: Ifuna kuphela udidi olunye lwenkcazi, ngokwesiqhelo igama lokugqitha. Ngelixa ixhaphakile, le yeyona ndlela incinci ikhuseleke ngakumbi njengoko amagama ayimfihlo anokubiwa, aqikelelwe, okanye aqhekezwe.
accountSecurity.tfaDescription: Ifuna iindidi ezimbini zenkcazi ezisuka kumacandelo amabini ahlukeneyo (umzekelo, into oyaziyo njenge gama lokugqithisa, kunye nento onayo njengekhowudi yexesha elinye ethunyelwe kwifowuni yakho). Oku kwandisa kakhulu ukhuseleko.
accountSecurity.mfaDescription: Ifuna iintlobo ezintathu okanye ngaphezulu ezahlukeneyo zeziqinisekiso. Umzekelo, igama eligqithisiweyo (yazi), ikhowudi yexesha elinye ngeSMS (yibe), kunye neskeni sebhayometriki njengophawu lweminwe (zi). Oku kunika inqanaba eliphezulu kakhulu lokhuseleko.

hipaaHistory.title: Imbali emfutshane kunye nesishwankathelo se-HIPAA
hipaaHistory.p1: Umthetho we-Inshurensi yeMpilo kunye nokuThatha uXanduva we-1996 (HIPAA) ngumthetho wase-United States we-federal eyenzelwe ukukhusela ulwazi olubucayi lwempilo yesigulana ukuba lubhengezwe ngaphandle kwemvume yesigulana okanye ulwazi. Ikwajolise ekuphuculeni ukusebenza kakuhle kunye nokusebenza kakuhle kwenkqubo yokhathalelo lwempilo.
hipaaHistory.privacyRuleDescription: Useka imigangatho yesizwe yokhuseleko lolwazi lwezempilo oluchonga umntu ngamnye (IiNkcukacha zezeMpilo eziKhuselweyo - PHI). Ijongana nokusetyenziswa kunye nokubhengezwa kwe-PHI 'ngamaqumrhu a-inshoriweyo.'
hipaaHistory.securityRuleDescription: Umisela imigangatho yesizwe yokukhusela ubumfihlo, imfezeko, kunye nokufumaneka kwe-PHI yombane (ePHI). Ifuna amaqumrhu agqunyiweyo ukuba aphumeze izikhuselo zolawulo, eziphathekayo, nezobuchule.
hipaaHistory.breachRuleDescription: Ifuna amaqumrhu a-inshurensi kunye namaqabane awo ezoshishino ukuba abonelele ngesaziso kulandela ukophulwa kwe-PHI engakhuselekanga.
hipaaHistory.coveredEntitiesDescription: Imithetho ye-HIPAA ngokuqhelekileyo isebenza kwizicwangciso zempilo, iindawo zokunakekelwa kwezempilo, kunye nababoneleli bezempilo abenza imisebenzi ethile yezempilo ngekhompyutha (umzekelo, oogqirha, iikliniki, izibhedlele, iikhemesti, iinkampani zomshuwalense).
hipaaHistory.hipaaMeaningTitle: Ithetha ukuthini i-HIPAA kooGqirha kunye neZigulana?
hipaaHistory.hipaaMeaningDescription: Oogqirha kunye nabanye ababoneleli bezempilo, i-HIPAA igunyazisa iiprothokholi ezingqongqo zokuphatha idatha yesigulana, iqinisekisa ukuba isetyenziselwa iinjongo ezivumelekileyo (unyango, intlawulo, imisebenzi yezempilo) okanye ngokugunyaziswa kwesigulane. Kwizigulane, i-HIPAA inikezela ngamalungelo malunga nolwazi lwabo lwezempilo, kubandakanywa namalungelo okuhlola nokufumana ikopi yeerekhodi zabo zempilo, kunye nokucela izilungiso.

VirtualMDSecurity.title: 3. Izenzo zoKhuseleko zeVirtualMD.app
VirtualMDSecurity.intro: I-VirtualMD.app isebenzisa isicwangciso sokhuseleko esinamanqanaba amaninzi eyilelwe ukukhusela iakhawunti yakho kunye nolwazi lomntu, ukutsala inkuthazo kwiindlela ezilungileyo zokhuseleko lwedatha. Ngelixa sisebenza ngokwahlukileyo kumboneleli wezempilo ngokwesiko kumxholo we-HIPAA, sinikezela ngeempawu zokhuseleko ezomeleleyo kubo bonke abasebenzisi:
VirtualMDSecurity.passwordEncryptionDescription: Zonke iipassword zabasebenzisi zifihliwe kusetyenziswa i-hashing algorithms yomgangatho woshishino. Oku kuthetha ukuba asigcini igama eliyimfihlo eliyimfihlo, sinikezela ngokhuseleko lweenkcukacha zeakhawunti yakho.
VirtualMDSecurity.twoFactorAuthDescription: Sigunyazisa i-2FA kuzo zonke iiakhawunti. Oku kufuna ukuba uqinisekise ubuwena usebenzisa into yesibini (ngokuqhelekileyo ikhowudi ethunyelwe kwi-imeyile yakho ebhalisiweyo okanye ifowuni) ukongeza kwi-password yakho, ukunciphisa kakhulu umngcipheko wokufikelela kwi-akhawunti engagunyaziswanga.
VirtualMDSecurity.threeFactorAuthDescription: Ngokhuseleko olongeziweyo, iVirtualMD.app ibonelela ngokuseta ungqinisiso lwezinto ezintathu. Ukuba yenziwe yasebenza, ukufikelela kwiakhawunti yakho kuya kufuna igama eliyimfihlo, ikhowudi ethunyelwe kwidilesi ye-imeyile ebhalisiweyo, KUNYE nekhowudi ethunyelwe ngeSMS kwinombolo yefowuni ephathwayo eqinisekisiweyo. Oku kudala umqobo owoyikekayo kwiinzame ezingagunyaziswanga zokufikelela kulwazi lwakho lwezonyango olugcinwe kwiqonga lethu.
VirtualMDSecurity.dataEncryptionDescription: Ulwazi olugcinwe kwi-akhawunti yakho ye-VirtualMD.app, kuquka idatha yencoko, iguqulelwe ngokuntsonkothileyo kwindawo yokuphumla. Idatha ekhutshelwe phakathi kwesixhobo sakho kunye neeseva zethu iguqulelwe ngokuntsonkothileyo kuhambo kusetyenziswa imigaqo ye-TLS/SSL.
VirtualMDSecurity.permanentDeletionDescription: Siyakuxhobisa ngokulawula idatha yakho. Unako ukucima ngokusisigxina iincoko zomntu okanye iakhawunti yakho yonke. Xa sele icinyiwe, olu lwazi alufumaneki kwiinkqubo zethu eziphambili, ezihambelana nemigaqo yokunciphisa idatha kunye nolawulo lomsebenzisi.
VirtualMDSecurity.outro: La manyathelo abonelela ngenqanaba lokhuseleko lwe-akhawunti oluthelekiswa nelo lweenkonzo eziphambili ze-intanethi eziphatha idatha yomuntu siqu ebuthathaka, ejolise ekuqinisekiseni iakhawunti yakho yeVirtualMD.app kunye nolwazi olungaphakathi kuyo luhlala luyimfihlo kwaye luphantsi kolawulo lwakho.

hipaaConsiderations.title: 4. VirtualMD.app & HIPAA Ukuqwalaselwa
hipaaConsiderations.p1: Ukuqonda indlela iVirtualMD.app enxibelelana ngayo ne-Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) ibalulekile kubasebenzisi bethu. Sizimisele ngokunzulu kukhuseleko kunye nokuba yimfihlo kolwazi owabelana ngalo. Iqonga lethu libandakanya imilinganiselo yokhuseleko eyomeleleyo, njengoko kuchaziwe kwicandelo "leZenzo zoKhuseleko zeVirtualMD.app", kubandakanywa uguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo lwedatha ekuphumleni nasekuhambeni, olunyanzelekileyo lwe-Two-Factor Authentication (2FA), kunye nokuqinisekiswa kwezinto ezintathu (3FA).
hipaaConsiderations.p2: Nangona kunjalo, kubalulekile ukuqonda ukuba i-VirtualMD.app, kwinkonzo yayo yangoku ejongene nabathengi, ayijoliswanga kwiimeko zokusetyenziswa ezifuna ukuthotyelwa kwe-HIPAA ngokusemthethweni kwigalelo elithe ngqo, ukugcinwa, okanye ukuqhutyelwa koLwazi lwezeMpilo oluKhuselweyo (PHI) ngabasebenzisi abasebenza njenge-HIPAA e-Covered Entities okanye i-Business Associates. Abasebenzisi abafuna ukuthotyelwa ngokungqongqo kwe-HIPAA ye-PHI abayilawulayo akufuneki basebenzise iqonga lethu jikelele ngeenjongo ezinjalo ngaphandle kokuba iSivumelwano esiNxulumene neShishini (BAA) sisendaweni kunye ne-VirtualMD.app yaloo meko yosetyenziso oluzinikeleyo. Kwinkonzo eqhelekileyo, abasebenzisi akufanele bafake nayiphi na ingcaciso enokuthi ilandelwe kwisigulane ngasinye kwimeko eya kuphula i-HIPAA, ngaphandle kwemvume ecacileyo yesigulane, enolwazi evuma ukusetyenziswa kweli qonga.
hipaaConsiderations.approachTitle: Indlela yethu: Ukulungelelanisa uBuchule boBuchule be-AI kunye noBucala beDatha
hipaaConsiderations.p3: Ukukubonelela ngeyona ngcebiso iphambili, yokuqonda imeko, kunye nengcebiso yezempilo eyeyakho i-AI ekwaziyo ukuyenza, iVirtualMD.app isebenzisa inkqubo ephucukileyo apho abantu bethu bezempilo be-AI banokufunda kunxibelelwano lwakho kwaye babelane ngomxholo ofanelekileyo omnye komnye. Ingcaphephe yakho yezempilo ye-AI, umzekelo, yenzelwe ukugcina umxholo kuzo zonke iiseshini kunye neengcali ezahlukeneyo ze-AI ukunika amava adibeneyo kunye nobukrelekrele.
hipaaConsiderations.p4: Le ndlela idityanisiweyo eqhutywa yi-AI ithetha ukuba ii-injini ze-AI ezisisiseko (ezinokusingathwa ngababoneleli abanje nge-OpenAI, i-Anthropic, i-Google, kunye nabanye) zinokuseta amacandelo edatha yencoko yakho engachongiweyo okanye eyenziwe ngomgunyathi okanye izinto zolwazi lweprofayile yakho njengenxalenye yokuhambisa le nkonzo. Ngelixa silungiselela ukusebenzisa kwethu ezi APIs zeqela lesithathu ukubathintela ekusebenziseni idatha yakho ukuqeqesha imifuziselo yabo jikelele (njengoko kucacisiwe ngakumbi "Usetyenziso lweDatha ngabaBoneleli beNjini yeqela le-AI"), ubume bolu didi oluphambili, olusasaziweyo lwemodeli ye-AI yahlukile kwindlela yemveli, ehlala igcinwe, ukuphatha idatha ngaphakathi komboneleli wezempilo kwiinkqubo ezingqongqo ze-PAHIAli ezakhelwe ukuthotyelwa kwangaphakathi kwe-PAHIAli.
hipaaConsiderations.p5: Sikholelwa ukuba le ndlela ivumela ukuba sinikezele ngolwazi olungenakulinganiswa lwezempilo oluqhutywa yi-AI kunye nenkxaso. Nangona kunjalo, idinga ukuqonda okucacileyo: <strong style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>obu bubuchule bomntu kunye ne-inter-AI yokufunda indawo yokufunda, kwimo yayo yangoku jikelele, ibandakanya imodeli yokuphatha idatha eyahlukileyo kulawulo oluthile, ukhuseleko lomzimba, kunye nobugcisa kunye neenkqubo zokusebenza ezigunyaziswe yi-HIPAA kwi-Incovered Entities ezilawula i-PII>
hipaaConsiderations.p6: Sisebenza ngokuzimisela ukuqhubeka siphucula ukhuseleko lwedatha yethu kwaye siphonononga iindlela eziya kukulungelelaniswa okukhulu nemigangatho yedatha ejolise kukhathalelo lwempilo lwemigangatho yeenkonzo ezahlukeneyo okanye iminikelo. Ngokusebenzisa i-VirtualMD.app yenkonzo jikelele, uyavuma kwaye uyayamkela le bhalansi yangoku: i-AI ephuculweyo, edityanisiweyo ye-AI yolwazi lwezonyango oluphezulu ibandakanya imodeli yokuphatha idatha eyahlukileyo kunaleyo yomboneleli wezempilo wemveli osebenza phantsi kwe-HIPAA.
hipaaConsiderations.p7: Ukuba umsebenzisi, ingakumbi uchwepheshe wezempilo, unqwenela ukuxoxa ngolwazi olunokuthi lubhekisele kumntu othile (isigulane), ngumsebenzisi uxanduva kuphelaukuqinisekisa ukuba bafumene zonke iimvume eziyimfuneko nezifanelekileyo ngokusemthethweni kuloo mntu. Imvume enjalo kufuneka ichaze ngokucacileyo ukuqonda komntu ukuba ulwazi luxutyushwa kwiqonga, ngelixa likhuselekile, alisebenzi phantsi kweSivumelwano esisemthethweni se-HIPAA yeSivumelwano soShishino kunye nomsebenzisi waloo ntsebenziswano ethile kunye nokuba ukuphathwa kwedatha yeqonga kuyahluka kwiinkqubo zendabuko ezihambelana ne-HIPAA.
hipaaConsiderations.p8: Abasebenzisi abanqwenela ukudlulisa ulwazi oluxutyushwe kwi-VirtualMD.app kwi-formal, inkqubo ehambelana ne-HIPAA (umzekelo, i-Electronic Medical Record yogqirha wabo) banoxanduva lokwenza oko ngokukhuselekileyo nangendlela ehambelana nayo yonke imimiselo esebenzayo kunye neenkqubo ezimiselweyo zomboneleli wabo.
hipaaConsiderations.alignmentTitle: Apho Sihambelana nemigaqo ye-HIPAA (Ngaphaya koKhuseleko Jikelele)
hipaaConsiderations.userControlDescription: Sikunika izixhobo zokufikelela kunye nokucima ngokusisigxina iincoko zakho kunye neenkcukacha zeakhawunti, ukuhambelana nemigaqo yokunciphisa idatha kunye namalungelo omntu ahlala egxininiswa kwimimiselo yabucala.
hipaaConsiderations.anonymizationDescription: Ukusetyenziswa kwethu kwedatha engaziwa, edityanisiweyo yokuphucula inkqubo yinkqubo ethi, xa yenziwe ngokufanelekileyo, ibe yindlela eqhelekileyo yokuphucula iinkonzo ze-AI ngelixa ukhusela ubumfihlo bomntu ngamnye.

userResponsibility.title: 5. Uxanduva loMsebenzisi kunye nokusetyenziswa okusesikweni
userResponsibility.intro: I-VirtualMD.app ibonelela ngezixhobo ezinamandla ze-AI zokufikelela kulwazi lwezonyango kunye nokubandakanyeka kwiingxoxo ezinxulumene nempilo. Ngelixa sizabalazela ukuchaneka kunye nokhuseleko, ukusetyenziswa okunoxanduva kweqonga lethu kukuzinikela okwabelwana ngako. Ngokusebenzisa iVirtualMD.app, uyavuma ukuthobela izikhokelo zokuziphatha kwaye uqonde amandla kunye nemida yeqonga.
userResponsibility.noReviewDescription: Ukukhusela ubumfihlo bakho, abasebenzi beVirtualMD.app abazijongi rhoqo iincoko zakho zabucala nabantu bethu be-AI. Oku kugxininisa ukubaluleka kokusebenzisa kwakho iqonga ngenkathalo.
userResponsibility.prohibitedContentDescription: Uyavuma ukungasebenzisi iVirtualMD.app ukufuna ulwazi okanye isikhokelo malunga nendlela yokwenzakalisa wena okanye abanye. Iqonga lethu alenzelwanga ukungenelela kwintlekele kwiimeko ezinjalo. Ukuba uneengcinga zokuzenzakalisa okanye zokwenzakalisa abanye, nceda uqhagamshelane neenkonzo zikaxakeka okanye umnxeba wonxunguphalo ngoko nangoko.
userResponsibility.consultPractitionerDescription: IVirtualMD.app sisixhobo solwazi kwaye AYIYAYI indawo yeengcebiso zobuchwephesha bonyango, ukuxilongwa, okanye unyango oluvela kumboneleli wezempilo oqeqeshiweyo. Soloko udibana nogqirha wakho okanye omnye ugqirha oqeqeshiweyo nangaziphi na iimeko zempilo ezimandundu okanye ngaphambi kokuba wenze naziphi na izigqibo ezinxulumene nempilo yakho.
userResponsibility.emergencySituationsDescription: I-VirtualMD.app AYIKWAZI ukwenza egameni lakho ngexesha likaxakeka. Umzekelo, ukuba inkqubo icebisa ukuba ufowunele u-911 okanye uye kwigumbi likaxakeka ngokusekelwe kulwazi olunikezayo, unoxanduva lodwa lokuthatha elo nyathelo. Iqonga lethu alinawo amandla okuthumela iinkonzo ezingxamisekileyo.
userResponsibility.outro: Ukubambelela kwakho kwezi zikhokelo kuqinisekisa indawo ekhuselekileyo nemveliso kubo bonke abasebenzisi kwaye kunceda ukugcina intembeko yenkqubo yokufuna ulwazi.

privacyScenarios.title: 6. Iimeko zaBucala eziSebenzayo kunye neNgqwalasela ePhezulu
privacyScenarios.scenario1Question: Uyabuza: "Ndinqwenela ukubuza iqela le-AI le-VirtualMD.app malunga nomcimbi ongathandekiyo kunye nohlazo onxulumene nempilo. Yintoni endikhuselayo?"
privacyScenarios.scenario1Answer: Impendulo yethu: Siyaqonda ukuba iingxoxo ngezempilo zinokuba zezomntu buqu. Iileya ezininzi ziyakukhusela:
privacyScenarios.confidentialConvosDescription: Iincoko zakho nabantu bethu be-AI zenzelwe ukuba ngasese. Njengoko kuchaziwe kwiSithembiso sethu saBucala, abasebenzi beVirtualMD.app abawujongi rhoqo umxholo wakho wencoko yabucala.
privacyScenarios.dataEncryptionDescription: Yonke idatha yencoko iguqulelwe ngokuntsonkothileyo zombini kuhambo (phakathi kwesixhobo sakho kunye neeseva zethu zisebenzisa i-TLS/SSL) kwaye xa iphumla (xa igcinwe koovimba bethu).
privacyScenarios.accountSecurityDescription: Iakhawunti yakho ikhuselwe ngegama lakho eliyimfihlo kunye nesinyanzelo seZiqinisekiso eziZimbini (2FA), kunye nenketho yoQinisekiso lwezinto eziNtathu (3FA), okwenza ukufikelela okungagunyaziswanga kwimbali yakho yencoko kube nzima kakhulu.
privacyScenarios.deletionControlDescription: Unamandla okucima ngokusisigxina nayiphi na incoko ethile okanye iakhawunti yakho yonke nangaliphi na ixesha, ngeendlela eziyilelwe ukuba zingahlawuleki kwiinkqubo zethu eziphambili.
privacyScenarios.anonymizationDescription: Kuphela idatha engachazwanga kunye nehlanganisiweyo (ihluthwe zonke izichongi zomntu) isetyenziselwa ukuphucula imifuziselo yethu ye-AI. Isiqulatho sakho sobuqu, esibonakalayo sencoko asisetyenziselwa le njongo ngaphandle kokungaziwa.
privacyScenarios.scenario1Outro: Ngelixa la manyathelo abonelela ngokhuseleko olomeleleyo, hlala ukhumbula ukuba akukho nkqubo ingangeneki. Sikhuthaza abasebenzisi ukuba balumkele ulwazi ababelana ngalo, njengoko bebeya kwenza kulo naluphi na unxibelelwano lwedijithali.
privacyScenarios.scenario2Title: Imeko yesi-2: Ukugcina ulwazi lweProfayili (umzekelo, Amayeza)
privacyScenarios.scenario2Question: Uyabuza: "Ndikumayeza athile kwaye ndifuna ukuwagcina kwiprofayili yam ukuze i-AI yeNgcali yezeMpilo yeCarol iya kuba nomxholo weengxoxo ezintsha. Ingaba idatha yam ikhuselwe njani ukuze kuphela ii-AI kwaye akukho bantu baya kufikelela?"
privacyScenarios.scenario2Answer: Impendulo yethu: Ukugcina ulwazi lwamayeza kwiprofayili yakho kunokuphucula imeko yeempendulo ze-AI. Nantsi indlela idatha ekhuselwe ngayo:
privacyScenarios.profileSecurityDescription: Njengedatha yencoko yakho, ulwazi lweprofayile yakho, kubandakanywa uludwe lwamayeza, lukhuselwe ngokhuseleko lwe-akhawunti efanayo (igama lokugqitha, 2FA/3FA) kunye nemilinganiselo yoguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo (ekuphumleni nasekuhambeni).
privacyScenarios.accessControlsDescription: Ukufikelela kwiirekhodi zedatha yomsebenzisi ngabasebenzi be-VirtualMD.app kulawulwa ngokungqongqo, kuphela kubantu abagunyazisiweyo kwiimfuno ezithile zokusebenza okanye zenkxaso (umzekelo, ukuncedisa umba we-akhawunti owubikayo), kwaye ulawulwa yimigaqo-nkqubo yangasese yangaphakathi kunye nokungena. Ukhangelo oluqhelekileyo lwedatha yeprofayile yomsebenzisi aluvumelekanga.
privacyScenarios.aiAccessDescription: Abantu be-AI, njengeNgcali yezeMpilo ye-AI uCarol, bafikelele kwiindawo ezifanelekileyo zeprofayili yakho (ezifana noluhlu lwamayeza, ukuba unike bona) ngenkqubo ukubonelela ngeempendulo ezihambelana nomxholo ngexesha leengxoxo zakho. Olu fikelelo yinxalenye yengqiqo yokusebenza ye-AI ukukunceda ngcono.
privacyScenarios.techNoteQuestion: Ubuzile: "Ngaba kunokwenzeka ukukrazula imiyalezo ukuze nabantu abaqhuba inkampani bangakwazi ukuyifunda (njengamagama ayimfihlo) ngaphandle kwemvume ecacileyo?"
privacyScenarios.techNoteP1: Oku kubhekiselele kwiikhonsepthi ezinje ngesiphelo-ukuya-esiphelweni uguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo (E2EE) apho kuphela umsebenzisi-siphelo obambe iqhosha lokugqibela lokuguqulela. I-VirtualMD.app isebenzisa robust uguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo kwindawo yokuphumla kuyo yonke idatha enovakalelo, kuquka imbali yakho yencoko kunye neenkcukacha zeprofayile, usebenzisa algorithms aqinileyo, akumgangatho weshishini. Oku kuthetha ukuba idatha egcinwe koovimba bethu ifihliwe.
privacyScenarios.techNoteP2: Ngelixa okwangoku singasebenzisi isitshixo esikhethekileyo somsebenzisi we-E2EE yedatha yencoko eya kwenza ukuba kube nzima ngokobuchwepheshe kubalawuli benkqubo abagunyazisiweyo ukuba bakhuphe ukuntsonkotha (ngokufana nokuba zingaphi iinkonzo zelifu ezisebenzayo), ukufikelela kwidatha efihliweyo esisiseko kuthintelwe kakhulu, kufakwe, kwaye kulawulwe ngokhuseleko lwangaphakathi olungqongqo kunye nemigaqo-nkqubo yabucala. Abasebenzi bethu abavumelekanga ukuba bafikelele kumxholo wakho wencoko yabucala ngaphandle kweemeko ezicacileyo nezilawulwayo, ezinjengokuphendula isicelo senkxaso esithe ngqo esivela kuwe malunga nencoko ethile okanye njengoko kufunwa ngumthetho. Le ndlela ilinganisa ukhuseleko oluluqilima kunye neemfuno zokusebenza zokugcina nokuxhasa iqonga.
privacyScenarios.techNoteP3: I-password yeakhawunti yakho, nangona kunjalo, iphathwa ngokwahlukileyo: iyakhawuleza kwaye igalelwe ityuwa, okuthetha ukuba asisoze sagcina igama lakho lokugqithisa lokwenene kwaye asinakuyifumana.
privacyScenarios.thirdPartyDataTitle: Ukusetyenziswa kweeNkcukacha ngabaBoneleli beNjini yeQela le-AI
privacyScenarios.thirdPartyDataQuestion: Ubuye wabuza: "Ngaba ii-APIs zeenjini ze-AI esizisebenzisayo ziyakwazi ukukhuselwa ekusebenziseni ukuqeqeshwa ngu (a) VirtualMD.app (b) OpenAI, (c) Anthropic ... njl ...? Okanye ngaba zonke zikhuselwe i-priori ngokuzenzekelayo?"
privacyScenarios.thirdPartyDataAnswer: Lo ngumba obalulekileyo wokuphatha idatha yethu:
privacyScenarios.VirtualMDTrainingDescription: Njengoko kuchaziwe kwiSibhambathiso sethu saBucala, sisebenzisa kuphela idatha engaziwa kwaye ehlanganisiweyo kuphuculo lwangaphakathi kunye noqeqesho lweenkqubo zethu zobunini kunye nengqiqo yolungelelwaniso lwe-AI. Idata yakho ebonwa nguwe okanye umxholo wencoko ekrwada awusetyenziselwa le njongo ngaphandle kokungaziwa.
privacyScenarios.thirdPartyTrainingTitle: (b, c, njl.) Ababoneleli be-API beqela lesithathu (umzekelo, i-OpenAI, i-Anthropic):
privacyScenarios.thirdPartyTrainingDescription: I-VirtualMD.app ikhetha ngononophelo kwaye idibanise nababoneleli bemodeli be-AI abakhokelayo. Ngeenkonzo ezifikelelwe ngee-APIs (i-Application Programming Interfaces), ababoneleli abaphambili abafana ne-OpenAI kunye ne-Anthropic banemigaqo-nkqubo yokusetyenziswa kwedatha echaza ukuba idatha efakwe ngee-APIs zabo AYIsetyenziswa ngabo ukuqeqesha imifuziselo yesiseko sabo ngokubanzi. Simisela ukusetyenziswa kwethu kwezi nkonzo ukuze zihambelane nolu khetho lokugcinwa kwabucala. Siyakukhuthaza ukuba ujonge kwakhona imigaqo-nkqubo yokusetyenziswa kwedatha yaba baboneleli be-AI bangaphantsi ukuba unenkxalabo ethile.
privacyScenarios.outro: Sizibophelele ekuqinisekiseni ukuba unxibelelwano lwakho alupheleli nje ekuqondeni kodwa lukwasingathwa ngentlonipho kubumfihlo bakho kwiqonga lethu kunye namaqabane ethu eteknoloji.

conclusion.title: 7. Isiphelo kunye neZinto eziThathayo eziphambili
conclusion.intro: IVirtualMD.app inikezelwe ekuxhobiseni abasebenzisi ngolwazi olufikelelekayo noluqondakalayo lwezempilo nge-AI ephucukileyo. Sibeka phambili ukhuseleko lwedatha yakho yobuqu ngamanyathelo aqinileyo abandakanya ukuqinisekiswa kwezinto ezininzi kunye noguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo. Ngelixa sizama ukufikelela kwimigangatho ephezulu yokukhusela idatha, iqonga lethu jikelele aliyithathi indawo yeenkonzo ezithobela ngokusemthethweni i-HIPAA yokhathalelo lwesigulane ngokuthe ngqo ngababoneleli bezempilo abathile. Abasebenzisi kufuneka bawuqonde lo mahluko kwaye basebenzise iVirtualMD.app ngokuthembekileyo nangokuziphatha.
conclusion.privacyPriorityDescription: Sikhusela idatha yakho kwaye asiyi kuthengisa iinkcukacha zakho zobuqu.
conclusion.anonymizedDataDescription: Sisebenzisa idatha engabonakaliyo ukuphucula i-AI yethu kunye neenkonzo zeqonga.
conclusion.accountSecurityDescription: Sinikezela nge-2FA (eyimfuneko) kunye ne-3FA (ukhetho) yokukhusela i-akhawunti, xa kuthelekiswa neenkonzo eziphambili ze-intanethi.
conclusion.dataControlDescription: Ungazicima ngokusisigxina iincoko kunye neakhawunti yakho.
conclusion.hipaaConsiderationsDescription: Inkonzo jikelele yeVirtualMD.app ayisiyiyo i-HIPAA e-Inshurensi yeZiko. Sikhusela idatha kodwa sihluke ekuthotyelweni okusemthethweni kwe-HIPAA yokhathalelo oluthe ngqo lwesigulane kunye nababoneleli abathile.
conclusion.ethicalUseDescription: Musa ukuzisebenzisa ukuzenzakalisa/ukwenzakalisa abanye. Soloko udibana nabasebenzi bezempilo kwiimeko ezimandundu. Asikwazi ukuthumela iinkonzo zikaxakeka.
conclusion.outro: Siyakukhuthaza ukuba usebenzise iVirtualMD.app njengesixhobo esinamandla sokufunda kunye nokuhlola, uhlala uhambelana nesikhokelo esivela kwiingcali zezempilo eziqeqeshiweyo. Ukuqonda kwakho le migaqo-nkqubo kusinceda sigcine iqonga elikhuselekileyo, elikhuselekileyo, nelisebenzayo lomntu wonke.

imagingAIExplainer.title: Ukuqonda i-AI kwiMifanekiso yezeMpilo
imagingAIExplainer.subtitle: Isikhokelo esilula sendlela iikhomputha ezinceda ngayo iingcali zempilo zibone ngokucacileyo.
imagingAIExplainer.author: Icaciswa ngu: Ron Rubin, PhD (VirtualMD.app Technologies)

whatIsImaging.title: Yintoni iMifanekiso yeMpilo (Umfanekiso)?
whatIsImaging.intro: Cinga ngemifanekiso yempilo njengokuthatha imifanekiso ngaphakathi emzimbeni wakho. Iingcali zempilo zisebenzisa oomatshini abakhethekileyo ukwenza le mifanekiso, ebanceda babone amathambo, amalungu, izihlunu nemithambo yegazi ngaphandle kokwenza utyando. Ngokomzekelo, i-X-reyi igqwesileyo ekuboneni amathambo ukuze afumane ukuphuka, ngelixa i-CT scan inikeza inkcazo ecacileyo, i-cross-sectional view ye-organ efana nengqondo.

types.ctScans: I-CT Scans: Njenge-super-detailed, i-3D X-ray, ebonisa "iziqwenga" zomzimba.
types.mriScans: I-MRI Scans: Isebenzisa iimagnethi ezinamandla ukufumana imifanekiso ecacileyo kakhulu yezicubu ezithambileyo, njengengqondo, izihlunu, okanye iigaments.
types.ultrasound: I-Ultrasound:Isebenzisa amaza omsindo ukubona izitho kwaye, ngokuqhelekileyo, ukujonga iintsana ngexesha lokukhulelwa.
types.microscope: Izilayidi zeMicroscope: Iisampuli zezicubu ezincinci zijongwa phantsi kwe-microscope ukuxilonga izifo kwinqanaba leselula ( Pathology ).
types.eyePhotos: Iifoto zamehlo: Iifoto ezikhethekileyo zangaphakathi kwiliso ukuze zikhusele iimeko ezifana ne-diabetes retinopathy (i-Ophthalmology).
types.cameraScopes: Iipilisi zekhamera / i-Scopes: Iikhamera ezincinci ezisetyenziselwa ukujonga ngaphakathi kwenkqubo yokugaya ( Gastroenterology ).

whatIsImaging.outro: Le mifanekiso zizixhobo ezibalulekileyo ezinceda iingcali zempilo ukuba zichonge izigulo, zijonge ukuba unyango lusebenza kakuhle kangakanani na, okanye isikrini seengxaki ezinokubakho kwangoko.

whatIsAI.title: Yintoni iArtificial Intelligence (AI)?
whatIsAI.intro: I-AI ikakhulu yinzululwazi yokufundisa iikhompyutha ukwenza imisebenzi edla ngokufuna ubukrelekrele bomntu, njengokufunda kwimizekelo, ukusombulula iingxaki, kunye nokwenza izigqibo. Kwimifanekiso yezempilo, sinokucinga nge-AI njengomncedisi onobuchule obuphezulu kwiingcali zempilo.
whatIsAI.process: Isebenzisa iinkqubo zekhompyutha ezikhethekileyo (algorithms) eziye zaqeqeshwa kumawaka, okanye kwizigidi zemifanekiso yezonyango. Ngokuhlalutya le datha eninzi, i-AI ifunda ukubona iipatheni ezifihlakeleyo-ezinye zazo ezinzima emehlweni omntu ukubona, okanye iipatheni ezibonisa ukuba nokwenzeka okukhulu kwesifo esithile. Inkqubo esisiseko kukuba idatha (imifanekiso) yondliwa kwi-AI, ethi emva koko ivelise ingqiqo, njengokubeka iflegi kwindawo ekrokrisayo.

howAIHelps.title: Inokunceda njani i-AI ngeMifanekiso yezeMpilo?
howAIHelps.intro: Uphando lwethu lwezenzululwazi luqaqambisa iindlela ezininzi eziphambili ze-AI esele zenza umahluko:

accuracy.title: Ukufumana Iingxaki Ngokuchaneke Ngakumbi
accuracy.description: Ngamanye amaxesha, iimpawu zokuqala zesifo zinobuqili obumangalisayo kwaye kulula ukuziphosa kwiskeni. I-AI inokusebenza njengesibini esiphaphileyo samehlo, ijonga ngokucwangcisiweyo yonke indawo yomfanekiso kwaye iqaqambise iindawo eziqinisekisa ujongo olusondeleyo. Umzekelo, i-AI inokuzoba isangqa malunga neqela elincinci leeseli kwi-mammogram enokuba sisalathisi sokuqala somhlaza.
accuracy.example: Umzekelo: Kwi-mammograms (i-X-ray yesifuba), olunye uphando lubonise i-AI yanceda ukufumana i-29% ye-cancer ngaphezulu ngaphandle kokubonisa abasebenzisi abasempilweni ngokungalunganga. Kwiikholonoscopies (ukukhangela ukukhula okubizwa ngokuba yi-polyps), i-AI yanceda iingcali zezempilo ukuba zifumane iipolyps ezinokuba nomhlaza ngokuziqaqambisa ngexesha lokwenyani kwifidi yevidiyo.

speed.title: Ukukhawulezisa Izinto
speed.description: Ukufunda imifanekiso yezonyango, ingakumbi entsonkothileyo efana ne-CT scans epheleleyo, ithatha ixesha elininzi kunye noxinzelelo. I-AI inokukhawulezisa ngokukhawuleza le nkqubo. Iyakwazi ukuhlenga-hlengisa iimeko, ifake iflegi ezona zingxamisekileyo ukuba iphononongwe kwangoko, okanye iphathe imisebenzi yovavanyo yesiqhelo ukukhulula ixesha leengcaphephe.
speed.example: Umzekelo: Inkqubo ye-AI yokujonga iifoto zamehlo ngezibonakaliso zomonakalo wesifo sikashukela (i-diabetic retinopathy) inokunika umphumo ngokukhawuleza kwiklinikhi yokunyamekela. Oku kuthetha ukuba izigulane akufuneki zilinde idinga kunye nengcali yamehlo ukuze nje zihlolwe, okukhokelela kukhathalelo olukhawulezayo lwabantu abaninzi. Kwesinye isifundo esikhulu, i-AI yanceda ukunciphisa ixesha le-radiologists elichitha ukufunda i-mammograms phantse isiqingatha.

consistency.title: Ukwenza ukuxilongwa kuhambelane ngakumbi
consistency.description: Naphakathi kweengcali, kunokubakho umahluko omncinci, ozimeleyo kwindlela otolikwa ngayo umfanekiso. I-AI inikezela ngokusemgangathweni, uhlalutyo olunenjongo rhoqo, olunceda ukunciphisa oku kuguquguquka.
consistency.example: Umzekelo: Xa ujonga iisampulu zethishu phantsi kwe-microscope (i-pathology), ukufumanisa "ibakala" elichanekileyo le-tumor ngamanye amaxesha kunokuba yinto engaqondakaliyo. Inkqubo ye-AI, eqeqeshwe kwiinkcukacha eziqinisekisiweyo liqela leengcali, inokubonelela ngebakala elihambelanayo, ukuqinisekisa ukuba iziphumo zifana kwaye zithembeke kwiingcali ezahlukeneyo zempilo kunye nezibonelelo.

challenges.title: Ngaba i-AI igqibelele?
challenges.intro: Hayi, kwaye kubalulekile ukuqonda imida yayo. Ngelixa i-AI inamandla, kukho imingeni ebalulekileyo yokujongana nayo:
challenges.bias: Ubulungisa kunye ne-Bias: I-AI ilungile kuphela njengedatha eqeqeshwe kuyo. Ukuba iqeqeshwe kuphela kwimifanekiso kwiqela elinye labantu, isenokungasebenzi kakuhle kwabanye. Ukuqinisekisa ngedatha yoqeqesho eyahlukeneyo kubalulekile ukunqanda umkhethe.
challenges.uncommonCases: Amatyala angaqhelekanga: I-AI igqwesile ekuqapheliseni iipateni ezibone amaxesha amaninzi. Isenokusokola ngezifo ezinqabileyo okanye imiboniso engaqhelekanga engakhange iqeqeshwe kuyo.
challenges.teamwork: Ukubaluleka koMsebenzi weQela: Eyona ndlela ilungileyo yintsebenziswano yabantu-AI. I-AI sisixhobo *sokunceda* iingcali zempilo ngokuphatha imisebenzi enzulu yedatha, kodwa ayithathi indawo yamava azo, uvelwano, kunye nokukwazi ukuqonda umsebenzisi ephela.
challenges.regulation: Ukhuseleko kunye noLawulo: Njengaso nasiphi na isixhobo esitsha sezempilo, izixhobo ze-AI zifuna uvavanyo oluqinileyo, ukuqinisekiswa, kunye nokubeka iliso okuqhubekayo ukuqinisekisa ukuba zikhuselekile, ziyasebenza, kwaye zibonelela ngeenzuzo zangempela kubasebenzisi.
challenges.outro: Abaphandi kunye nabalawuli basebenza nzima ukujongana nale mingeni. Injongo kukudibanisa i-AI kukhathalelo lwezempilo ngokukhuselekileyo nangempumelelo ukuphucula iziphumo zesigulane.

conclusion.title: Amaqokobhe enathi
conclusion.text: I-AI iba liqabane elixabisekileyo kwimifanekiso yezempilo, inceda iingcali zempilo ukuba zifumane izifo kwangaphambili, ngokukhawuleza, kwaye zithembeke ngakumbi. Kufana nokunika iingcali zempilo umbono ophuculweyo kunye nomncedisi ongadinwayo ukuba ahlole imifanekiso entsonkothileyo, ekugqibeleni ekhokelela kukhathalelo olungcono kubasebenzisi.

mentalHealthWhitepaper.title: I-AI kwiMpilo yengqondo: Ukuqhubela phambili, imingeni, kunye nezicelo zeKlinikhi
mentalHealthWhitepaper.authors: Ron Rubin, PhD kunye noSandy Miles

disclaimer.title: I-Disclaimer ebalulekileyo
disclaimer.text: Ngelixa i-VirtualMD.app ibonelela ngetekhnoloji ye-AI yokusika yovavanyo kunye noncedo lwempilo yengqondo, kubalulekile ukuqonda ukuba iinkqubo zethu ze-AI, nokuba zintsonkothe ​​kangakanani, AYIZINTO zithatha indawo yeengcali zempilo yengqondo ezinelayisensi. Ulwazi kunye nokuqonda okubonelelweyo kufuneka kuhlale kuvavanywa ngababoneleli bezempilo abaqeqeshiweyo. Kwimeko engxamisekileyo yempilo yengqondo, nceda ucofe ku-911 (US), 999 (UK), 112 (EU), 101 (Israel), okanye 911 (Canada) ngokukhawuleza, okanye uye kwisebe elikufutshane nawe likaxakeka. Kuzo naziphi na iinkxalabo zempilo yengqondo okanye izigqibo zonyango, soloko udibana nabanikezeli bezempilo abaqeqeshiweyo. Itekhnoloji yeVirtualMD.app yenzelwe ukukhulisa nokuxhasa ukhathalelo lwempilo yengqondo yobuchwephesha, hayi endaweni yayo.

abstract.title: Abstract
abstract.text: Eli phepha liphonononga indima eguqukayo ngokukhawuleza yobukrelekrele bokwenziwa kukhathalelo lwempilo yengqondo, iqaqambisa inkqubela yakutshanje, ubungqina bokusebenza, kunye nemingeni yokuphunyezwa. Sihlaziya uphuhliso kwiindawo ezine: inkxaso yokuxilonga, izicelo zonyango, ukubeka iliso kwesigulane, kunye nohlalutyo oluqikelelweyo. Izifundo zeklinikhi zakutsha nje zibonisa iinkqubo ze-AI zinokufikelela kwi-80-92% ukuchaneka ekufumaneni ukudakumba okukhulu kwiipatheni zeelwimi kunye ne-biomarkers yelizwi, ngelixa i-algorithms yombono wekhompyuter inokuchonga umngcipheko wokuzibulala kunye ne-85% ubuntununtunu ngokuhlalutya inkangeleko yobuso kunye neentshukumo ezincinci. Iimodeli zokusetyenzwa kweelwimi zendalo eziqeqeshwe kwiingxoxo zonyango zibonisa isithembiso ekuhambiseni imigaqo yonyango yokuziphatha kwengqondo, kunye nezilingo ezilawulwa ngokungenamkhethe ezibonisa ukusebenza kakuhle okufaniswa neengcali zokunyanga abantu ngenxa yokudakumba okuphakathi ukuya kokuphakathi kunye nokuxhalaba (I-Journal of Medical Internet Research, 2022). Iinkqubo zokubeka iliso ezisekwe kwi-smartphone ziyakwazi ukubona iimpawu ezilumkisayo zokuphinda ubuyele kwisigulo esinzulu ngengqondo ukuya kuthi ga kwiintsuku ezisi-7 ngaphambi kokuba kubonakale ukuwohloka kweklinikhi (JAMA Psychiatry, 2021). Ngaphandle kolu kuqhubela phambili, imiceli mngeni ebalulekileyo isekhona, kubandakanywa ukuthambekela kwe-algorithm, ukuqinisekiswa okulinganiselweyo kubantu abahlukeneyo, iinkxalabo zabucala, kunye nokudityaniswa kokuhamba komsebenzi okhoyo wekliniki. Sixoxa ngeengqwalasela zokuziphatha, izikhokelo zolawulo, kunye neendlela zokuvavanya impilo yengqondo ye-AI. Ngelixa itekhnoloji ye-AI ibonisa isithembiso esikhulu sokwandisa ukufikelela kukhathalelo lwempilo yengqondo kunye nokuphucula ukusebenza konyango, kufuneka ziphuhliswe kwaye zifakwe ngaphakathi kwesakhelo esibanzi esibeka phambili ukuqinisekiswa kweklinikhi, uqwalaselo lweenqobo ezisesikweni, kunye nokuphunyezwa okugxile eluntwini ukuphucula ngokwenene iziphumo zempilo yengqondo.

introduction.title: Intshayelelo
introduction.text: Umthwalo wokugula ngengqondo unikezela ngowona mceli mngeni mkhulu kwezempilo...
introduction.p1: Umthwalo wokugula ngengqondo unikezela ngowona mngeni ucinezelayo kukhathalelo lwempilo. Phantse umntu omnye kwabahlanu kwihlabathi liphela ufumana ukuphazamiseka kwempilo yengqondo minyaka le, kunye nokudakumba kuphela kuchaphazela abantu abangaphezu kwezigidi ezingama-300 kwihlabathi liphela (WHO, 2022). Okwangoku, ukunqongophala kwabasebenzi okuzingisileyo kunciphisa ukufikelela kukhathalelo - uMbutho wezeMpilo weHlabathi uqikelela ukunqongophala kwehlabathi le-1.18 yezigidi zeengcali zempilo yengqondo. Lo msantsa phakathi kweemfuno kunye nezibonelelo ezikhoyo uye wakhawulezisa umdla kwizisombululo ezisekelwe kubuchwepheshe, ngakumbi iinkqubo ze-intelligence (AI) ezinokuthi zikwazi ukwandisa ukufikelela kunye nokusebenza kakuhle kweenkonzo zempilo yengqondo.
introduction.p2: I-intersection ye-AI kunye nempilo yengqondo ibonise ukukhula okuphawulekayo kule minyaka ilishumi idlulileyo. Ukusuka kwizixhobo zokuhlola ezizenzekelayo kunye nee-arhente zeengxoxo ukuya kuhlalutyo oluqikelelweyo lokuthintela ukuphindaphinda, izicelo ze-AI kwi-psychiatry kunye ne-psychology ziye zanda kakhulu. Olu tshintsho lwenziwe ngokuhambela phambili ekusetyenzweni kolwimi lwendalo, ukufundwa koomatshini, umbono wekhompyuter, kunye nokwanda kwamathuba e-digital phenotyping ngokusebenzisa ii-smartphones kunye nezixhobo ezinxitywayo.
introduction.p3: Impilo yengqondo inika imingeni ekhethekileyo kunye namathuba okuphunyezwa kwe-AI. Ngokungafaniyo neengcali ezininzi zonyango, uvavanyo lwengqondo luxhomekeke kakhulu kwingxelo ezimeleyo, indlela yokuziphatha eqaphelekayo, iipateni zolwimi, kunye nemiba yomxholo kunovavanyo lwaselabhoratri okanye ukucinga. Oku kuhambelana kakuhle nezakhono ezikhulayo ze-AI ekuqondeni ulwimi, ukuqaphela ipateni kwidatha yokuziphatha, kunye nohlalutyo lweendlela ezininzi zokubonisa iimvakalelo.
introduction.p4: Eli phepha libonelela ngokuphononongwa okubanzi kwezicelo ze-AI zangoku kwimpilo yengqondo, ukuphonononga isiseko sobungqina bokusebenza kwabo, iindlela zemethodological, imingeni yokuphunyezwa, kunye nokuqwalaselwa kokuziphatha. Silungiselela uhlalutyo lwethu malunga neendawo ezine eziphambili: iinkqubo zenkxaso yokuxilonga, izicelo zonyango, ukubeka iliso kwesigulane, kunye nohlalutyo oluqikelelweyo lokucwangciswa kwonyango. Kwindawo nganye, sivavanya imeko yangoku yeteknoloji, sishwankathela iziphumo zophando eziphambili, kwaye sichonge izikhewu ezibalulekileyo ezifuna uphando olongezelelweyo.
introduction.p5: Kubalulekile ukuqaphela ukuba ngaphandle kwenkqubela phambili ebalulekileyo, izixhobo ze-AI kwimpilo yengqondo zenzelwe ukukhulisa, kungekhona ukubuyisela, oogqirha babantu. Imanyano yonyango phakathi kwesigulane kunye nomnikezeli ihlala ingundoqo kukhathalelo lwengqondo olusebenzayo. Ezona zicelo zithembisayo ziphakamisa i-AI yokwandisa amandla omboneleli, ukuphucula ukusebenza kakuhle, ukunika amandla ukungenelela kwangaphambili, kunye nokwandisa ukufikelela kwinkathalo esekelwe kubungqina kubantu abangagcinwanga.

methods.title: Iindlela/uBugcisa
methods.text: Iinkqubo ze-AI zangoku kwimpilo yengqondo zisebenzisa iindlela ezahlukeneyo zeendlela...
methods.p1: Iinkqubo zangoku ze-AI kwimpilo yengqondo zisebenzisa iindlela ngeendlela ezahlukeneyo, nganye ineengenelo ezithile kwizicelo ezahlukeneyo zeklinikhi. Iziseko ezingundoqo zobugcisa ziquka ukusetyenziswa kolwimi lwendalo (NLP), ukufunda ngomatshini (ML), umbono wekhompyutheni, kunye ne-digital phenotyping.
methods.p2: I-Natural Language Processing (NLP) yenza umqolo weenkqubo ezininzi ze-AI zempilo yengqondo, eyenza uhlalutyo lomxholo weelwimi kunye neepatheni zonxibelelwano. Iimodeli ezisekelwe kwinguqu ephucukileyo efana ne-BERT (i-Bidirectional Encoder Representations ezivela kwi-Transformers) kunye ne-GPT (i-Generative Pre-trained Transformer) ezahlukeneyo zivumela iinkqubo ukuba zitolike iingxelo zeklinikhi, ukubhalwa kweeseshoni zonyango, kunye nombhalo owenziwe ngesigulane kunye nokuqonda okukhulayo komxholo, iimvakalelo kunye nomxholo wengqondo. Ezi modeli zinokuchonga iimpawu zolwimi ezinxulumene neemeko ezithile, ezinje ngokuncipha kokuntsonkotha kolungelelwaniso kuxinzelelo okanye ukuphazamiseka kokuhambelana kwesemantic kwiziphazamiso zengqondo. Ezona nkqubo ziphucukileyo zeklinikhi ze-NLP zilungelelaniswe kakuhle kwimpilo yengqondo ethile, kubandakanywa amanqaku ekliniki angachazwanga, imibhalo yonyango, kunye nezixhobo zovavanyo lwengqondo eziqinisekisiweyo.
methods.p3: Iindlela zokuFunda ngoomatshini kuhlelo oluphantsi kolawulo lwempilo yengqondo (kwizicelo zokuxilonga), ukuhlanganisana okungajongwanga (ukuchonga iipatheni zeempawu zenoveli), ukuqinisa ukufunda (ukwenza ungenelelo lobuqu), kwaye ngokwandayo, ukufunda nzulu kokudityaniswa kwedatha ye-multimodal. Idatha yoqeqesho ngokuqhelekileyo ibandakanya iimvavanyo zeklinikhi ezicwangcisiweyo (umzekelo, i-PHQ-9 yokudakumba, i-GAD-7 yokukhathazeka), imilinganiselo yokuziphatha, imiqondiso ye-physiological, kunye nedatha yerekhodi yezempilo ye-elektroniki. Iindlela zokuqinisekisa ngokubanzi zisebenzisa i-k-fold cross-validation kunye neeseti zovavanyo lwangaphandle, kunye nomsebenzi ovavanyiweyo kusetyenziswa ubuntununtunu, ukuchaneka, amaxabiso aqikelelwayo alungileyo/abi, kunye nommandla ophantsi kwegophe lophawu lokusebenza (AUC-ROC).
methods.p4: Izicelo zeComputer Vision zihlalutya inkangeleko yobuso, iipateni zeemoto, kunye nokuziphatha okungathethwayo okuhambelana neemeko zengqondo. Uthungelwano lwe-neural ye-Convolutional kunye neemodeli zexeshana (umzekelo, iinethiwekhi ze-LSTM) ziyakwazi ukubona i-micro-expressions, iipateni zokujonga, kunye notshintsho lwe-psychomotor olunokuthi lubonise iimeko zeemvakalelo okanye ukubonakaliswa kweempawu. Ezi nkqubo zibaluleke kakhulu kwiimeko apho ukujongwa kokuziphatha kunceda ukuxilongwa, njengokuphazamiseka kwe-autism spectrum okanye iimpawu ze-catatonic kwisigulo esinzima sengqondo.
methods.p5: I-Digital Phenotyping imele indlela evelayo ephakamisa ukuqokelelwa kwedatha yokwenziwa kwii-smartphones kunye nezixhobo ezinxitywayo ukuchonga iipatheni zokuziphatha ezinxulumene neemeko zengqondo. Ezi nkqubo zihlalutya idatha ye-geolocation, amanqanaba omsebenzi, iipatheni zokulala, ukuphindaphinda konxibelelwano lwentlalo, amandla okuchwetheza, kunye neempawu zelizwi ukwakha i-biomarkers yedijithali yobume bempilo yengqondo. Le ndlela yenza ukuba kuqhubeke, ukubeka iliso kwizinto eziphilayo ngaphandle kwezicwangciso zeklinikhi, okunokuvumela ukubonwa kwangaphambili kweenguqu zempawu.
methods.p6: Izikhokelo zokudibanisa ziya zidibanisa iindlela ezininzi zovavanyo olubanzi. Ngokomzekelo, iisistim zinokuhlalutya umxholo weelwimi kunye ne-acoustics yezwi kunye nembonakalo yobuso ngexesha lodliwano-ndlebe lweklinikhi ukuphucula ukuchaneka koxilongo. Ngokufanayo, izicelo zonyango zinokudibanisa uhlalutyo lweemvakalelo zotshintshiselwano lombhalo kunye nedatha yokubeka iliso engenzi nto ukwenza ixesha longenelelo kunye nomxholo.
methods.p7: Iindlela zovavanyo lweenkqubo ze-AI zempilo yengqondo zibandakanya iimetriki zokuchaneka koxilongo (ubuntununtunu, ukuchaneka, i-AUC), uhlolo lokusebenziseka, kunye nokunyuka, amanyathelo eziphumo zekliniki ezivela kulingo olulindelekileyo. Imigangatho yegolide yokuthelekisa iyahluka ngokwesicelo kodwa ibandakanya udliwano-ndlebe olucwangcisiweyo lwezonyango, izixhobo zovavanyo eziqinisekisiweyo, kunye noxilongo lwemvumelwano yonyango. Uphononongo oluninzi lwakutsha nje lusebenzisa uyilo lolingo olungenamkhethe ukuvavanya ukhathalelo olongeziweyo lwe-AI ngokuchasene nonyango njengesiqhelo.
methods.p8: Iindlela zokubala ezigcina ubumfihlo zibaluleke kakhulu kwizicelo zempilo yengqondo zinikwa ubume bedatha yengqondo. Oku kuquka ukufunda okudityanelweyo (apho imifuziselo iqeqeshwa kwiindawo ezininzi ngaphandle kokwenza idatha embindini), iindlela zobuchule zabucala, kunye nokubala okukhuselekileyo kwamaqela amaninzi. Ezi ndlela zinceda ukulungelelanisa imfuno yedatha enkulu, eyahlukeneyo yoqeqesho kunye neemfuno zokuziphatha zokukhusela idatha.

diagnosticSupport.title: I-AI kwiNkxaso yoDiagnostic
diagnosticSupport.text: Iinkqubo ze-AI zibonise amandla athembisayo ekuxhaseni ukuxilongwa kwempilo yengqondo ...
diagnosticSupport.p1: Iinkqubo ze-AI zibonise amandla athembisayo ekuxhaseni ukuxilongwa kwempilo yengqondo kwiimeko ezininzi. Ezi zixhobo zihlalutya imithombo yedatha eyahlukeneyo kubandakanywa udliwano-ndlebe lweklinikhi, iimpendulo zemibuzo, iipatheni zokuthetha, imbonakalo yobuso, kunye nokuziphatha kwedijithali ukuchonga iimpawu zeempawu zokuphazamiseka kwengqondo.
diagnosticSupport.p2: Ekubhaqweni koxinzelelo, ii-algorithms ze-NLP ezihlalutya iimpawu zolwimi zifumene impumelelo ebonakalayo. Uphononongo luka-2021 kwi-JAMA Psychiatry luvavanye inkqubo ye-NLP ehlalutya iimpendulo zeteksti zasimahla kwii-prompts ezisemgangathweni kubo bonke abathathi-nxaxheba be-4,216. Inkqubo ibonise i-87% yobuntununtunu kunye ne-84% ekhethekileyo yokufumanisa ingxaki enkulu yokudakumba xa kuthelekiswa nodliwano-ndlebe olucwangcisiweyo lwekliniki. Ingakumbi iimpawu eziqikelelwayo ziquka ukusetyenziswa kwesimelabizo somntu wokuqala, amagama achukumisayo angalunganga, kunye nokuncipha kokwahluka kolwimi. Xa kudityaniswa nohlalutyo lwe-acoustic yezwi (ukubamba iimpawu zeprosodic ezifana nokunciphisa i-pitch variation kunye nesantya sokuthetha), ukuchaneka kokuxilonga kunyuke ukuya kuma-92%.
diagnosticSupport.p3: Ngokufanayo, uhlalutyo oluzenzekelayo lwentetho kunye neepatheni zolwimi lubonise ukusebenza ekuboneni ukuphazamiseka kwengqondo. Kuphononongo olulindelekileyo lokuqinisekisa olubandakanya abantu abadala abangama-382, inkqubo ye-AI ehlalutya ukuhambelana kwe-semantic, ukuntsonkotha kwe-syntactic, kunye neempawu ze-acoustic ngexesha lodliwano-ndlebe olufutshane olucwangcisiweyo luzuze ukuchaneka kwe-85% ekuchongeni ukuphazamiseka okuncinci kwengqondo, okuthelekiswa novavanyo olufutshane lwe-neuropsychological kodwa ifuna isampulu yentetho yemizuzu emi-3 kuphela.
diagnosticSupport.p4: Ukuphazamiseka kokuxhalaba, iinkqubo ezininzi ezidibanisa idatha ye-physiological (ukuguquguquka kwesantya sentliziyo, umsebenzi we-electrodermal) kunye nemilinganiselo yokuziphatha ibonise usetyenziso oluthile. Inkqubo enxibayo esekwe esweni i-autonomic biomarkers ngexesha loxinzelelo olusemgangathweni luchaze ngokuchanekileyo ukuphazamiseka okuxhalabisayo okuqhelekileyo kunye ne-83% echanekileyo kwisampulu yabathathi-nxaxheba be-189, kunye nokufumanisa ukuphazamiseka kwe-panic ukufikelela kwi-88%.
diagnosticSupport.p5: Izicelo zombono wekhompyuter zibonise isithembiso seemeko ezinamacandelo abonakalayo okuziphatha. Inkqubo yokufunda enzulu ehlalutya inkangeleko yobuso kunye neepatheni zentshukumo ngexesha lodliwano-ndlebe lwezonyango ezichonge ukuphazamiseka kwe-autism spectrum ngokuchaneka kwe-86% kubantwana abaneminyaka eyi-3-6 yeminyaka, enokuthi ivumele ukuhlolwa kwangaphambili kwiindawo zokhathalelo lokuqala. Ngokufanayo, uhlalutyo lokurekhodwa kwevidiyo ukusuka kuvavanyo olucwangcisiweyo lubonakalise ukuchaneka kwe-82% ekufumaneni ukuphazamiseka kwe-bipolar ngokusekwe kumahluko afihlakeleyo kwimisebenzi yemoto kunye nokubonakala kobuso ngexesha le-manic ngokuchasene nezigaba zoxinzelelo.
diagnosticSupport.p6: Iindlela zeDigital phenotyping, ukuhlalutya idatha ye-smartphone, zibonakalise ukuba zibalulekile ekubekweni iliso kwimeko. I-entropy yendawo (ukuhlukahluka kwiipatheni zokuhamba), ubude bokulala, kunye nokunxibelelana rhoqo kubonise ukulungelelaniswa okuphezulu (r = 0.71-0.84) kunye nezikali zokulinganisa ukudakumba okusemgangathweni, okwenza uvavanyo oluqhubekayo phakathi kokutyelela kweklinikhi.
diagnosticSupport.p7: Okubalulekileyo, umsebenzi wamva nje ugxile ekujonganeni ne-algorithmic bias kunye nokuqinisekisa ukusebenza ngokulinganayo kubantu abahlukeneyo. Uphononongo olukhulu lokuqinisekiswa kwe-algorithm yokuhlola ukudakumba kubathathi-nxaxheba be-8,200 abavela kwiimvelaphi ezahlukeneyo zobuhlanga kunye nezentlalo zoqoqosho zibonise ekuqaleni okucacileyo okuphantsi (73% vs. 89%) kubathathi-nxaxheba abamnyama xa kuthelekiswa nabathathi-nxaxheba abamhlophe. Emva kohlengahlengiso oluseti yoqeqesho olwahlukeneyo kunye nemigangatho yereferensi ehlengahlengisiweyo ngokwenkcubeko, iyantlukwano yentsebenzo yancitshiswa kakhulu, kwaphuculwa ngokukodwa ukuya kuma-85% kuwo onke amaqela abantu.
diagnosticSupport.p8: Ngaphandle kwezi nkqubela phambili, imingeni isahleli kwizicelo zokuxilonga. Uninzi lweenkqubo ziye zaqinisekiswa ngokuyintloko kwiisetingi zophando ezilawulwayo kuneendawo ezahlukeneyo zeklinikhi. Ngaphaya koko, uninzi lugxile kuhlelo lokubini (ubukho / ukungabikho kwemeko) endaweni yendlela yokulinganisa ethandwa kakhulu kunyango lwangoku lwengqondo. Iinzame zokujongana nale mida zibandakanya uphuhliso lweemodeli zokuxilonga ezivavanya imilinganiselo yeempawu kuyo yonke imida yokuxilonga yendabuko, ebonisa ngcono ubunyani obuntsokothileyo boxinzelelo lwengqondo.

therapeuticApplications.title: I-AI kwizicelo zoNyango
therapeuticApplications.text: Ungenelelo lonyango olusekwe kwi-AI kwimpilo yengqondo luye lwavela kwiinkqubo ezilula ezisekelwe kumgaqo...
therapeuticApplications.p1: Ungenelelo lwezonyango olusekwe kwi-AI kwimpilo yengqondo luye lwavela kwiinkqubo ezilula ezisekelwe kumgaqo ukuya kwii-arhente zeengxoxo ezinobunkunkqele ezikwaziyo ukuhambisa imigaqo yonyango esekelwe kubungqina. Ezi zicelo zithatha i-spectrum ukusuka kwi-automated digital therapeutics ukuya kwi-AI-augmented human treatment.
therapeuticApplications.p2: Iinkqubo zeengxoxo ze-AI eziphumeza imigaqo yonyango lokuziphatha (CBT) zenze olona vavanyo luqatha. Kulingo oluphawulekayo olulawulwa ngokungahleliwe olupapashwe kwi-Lancet Digital Health (2022), abathathi-nxaxheba be-1,032 abanokudakumba okuphakathi babelwa nokuba yinkqubo ye-CBT enikezelweyo ye-AI okanye unyango njengesiqhelo. Inkqubo ye-AI, eyabandakanya abasebenzisi kwiingxoxo zemihla ngemihla ezisekelwe kwiitekisi zokuphumeza iindlela eziphambili ze-CBT, zibonise ukunciphisa okuphawulekayo kwi-PHQ-9 amanqaku okudandatheka kwiiveki ze-12 xa kuthelekiswa neqela lokulawula (umlinganiselo ochanekileyo -2.85 amaphuzu, 95% CI -4.07 ukuya -1.63, p <0.001). Iziphumo zonyango zigcinwe kwi-6-inyanga yokulandelelana. Ngokucacileyo, amazinga okubambelela kwiprogram ye-AI (i-68% yokugqiba iprotocol epheleleyo) idlule amaxabiso aqhelekileyo ongenelelo lwedijithali oluzikhokelayo (ngokuqhelekileyo i-25-30%), ebonisa ukuba unxibelelwano lwengxoxo luphuculwe ukubandakanyeka.
therapeuticApplications.p3: Kwingxaki yokuxhalaba, iarhente yencoko efanayo ephumeza imigaqo yonyango oluveziweyo ibonise ukusebenza kokuphazamiseka koxinzelelo ngokubanzi kulingo lwabathathi-nxaxheba abangama-688. Inkqubo, ekhokele abasebenzisi ngokusebenzisa i-personal exposure hierarchies kunye nokuqhubela phambili kobunzima, iphumelele ukucutha okukhulu kwe-25% kumanqaku e-GAD-7 xa kuthelekiswa nolawulo loluhlu lokulinda, kunye neziphumo ezifaniswa neqela elikhokelwa ngugqirha we-CBT kuvavanyo lwasemva konyango. Uhlalutyo lweendleko lubonise ukuba ungenelelo lwe-AI luxabisa malunga nesinye kwisihlanu eso sonyango olulinganayo olunikezelwe ngumntu ngelixa unikezela ngeenzuzo ezifanayo zonyango kwiimeko ezithambileyo ukuya kweziphakathi.
therapeuticApplications.p4: Ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka kwengqondo kunye noxinzelelo, unyango lwe-AI lubonise isithembiso seemeko ezibandakanya ukuphuthelwa, ukuphazamiseka koxinzelelo lwasemva koxinzelelo, kunye nokuphazamiseka kokusetyenziswa kweziyobisi. Inkqubo yokufunda eyomelezwayo yokuphazamiseka kokusetyenziswa kotywala, eye yazisa ngokuguqukayo imiyalezo ekhuthazayo eyenzelwe umntu ngokusekwe kwiimeko ezifunyanisiweyo zomngcipheko, yanciphisa iintsuku zokusela ezixeliweyo ngama-34% xa kuthelekiswa nomxholo wemfundo omileyo kulingo lweenyanga ezi-3 olubandakanya abathathi-nxaxheba abangama-352. Ikhono lenkqubo lokuchonga ixesha lokungenelela elichanekileyo elisekelwe kwidatha yokubeka iliso (umzekelo, idatha yendawo ebonisa ukusondela kwiindawo zokusela rhoqo) ibonakala iqhuba ukusebenza kwayo okuphezulu.
therapeuticApplications.p5: Ukwandiswa kwe-AI yonyango lomntu kuye kwabonisa ixabiso. Inkqubo yoqeqesho lonyango ehlalutye ukubhalwa kweeseshoni ukubonelela abanyangi ngengxelo yokubambelela kunye neengcebiso eziphucula ukuthembeka kweprotocol ye-CBT ngama-32% kwaye yadityaniswa nokunciphisa okukhulu kweempawu (ubungakanani besiphumo d = 0.41) xa kuthelekiswa nonyango olungaxhatshazwanga kulingo olungenamkhethe. Iingcali zonyango zichaze ukuba impendulo ye-AI yanceda ukugcina ugxininiso kubuchule obusekelwe kubungqina kunye nokuchonga amathuba ongenelelo oluthile olunokuthi luphoswe ngenye indlela.

patientMonitoring.title: I-AI kuHlolo lweSigulane kunye noThintelo lokuBuyisela kwakhona
patientMonitoring.text: Izicelo zokubeka iliso eziqhubekayo zibonisa isizinda esithembisayo se-AI kwimpilo yengqondo...
patientMonitoring.p1: Izicelo zokubeka iliso eziqhubekayo zibonisa i-domain ethembisayo ngokukodwa ye-AI kwimpilo yengqondo, eyenza ukubonwa kweenguqu zempawu phakathi kokutyelela kweklinikhi kunye nokungenelela kwangaphambili. Ezi nkqubo zikholisa ukonyusa izinzwa ze-smartphone, izixhobo ezinxitywayo, kunye nonxibelelwano lwabasebenzisi ukwakha ii-biomarkers zedijithali zesimo sengqondo.
patientMonitoring.p2: Kwizigulo ezimandundu zengqondo, kubandakanywa i-schizophrenia kunye ne-bipolar disorder, ukufunyaniswa kophawu lwesilumkiso kwangethuba kubonise uncedo olubalulekileyo lwezonyango. Kuphononongo olulindelekileyo lwenyanga ye-12 yabantu abangama-304 abane-schizophrenia, inkqubo yokubeka iliso esekwe kwi-smartphone ehlalutya iipateni zokuthetha, ukulala, ukuhamba, kunye nokunxibelelana kwezentlalo kuchonge i-89% ye-psychotic iphinda ibuyele kumndilili weentsuku ze-7.4 ngaphambi kokuba ukuwohloka kweklinikhi kubonakale ngexesha lokhathalelo lwesiqhelo. Xa idityaniswe neprotocol yempendulo yeklinikhi, inkqubo yanciphisa amazinga okulaliswa esibhedlele nge-28% xa kuthelekiswa nonyango njengesiqhelo, iphakamisa inzuzo enkulu kuzo zombini izigulane kunye neenkqubo zempilo.
patientMonitoring.p3: Iindlela ezifanayo ziye zabonisa ukusebenza kakuhle kwi-bipolar disorder. Inkqubo ye-multimodal ehlalutya iipateni zokuchwetheza, i-acoustics yezwi, ubude bokulala, kunye namanqanaba omsebenzi achongiweyo i-manic kunye ne-depressive episode iqala nge-82% kunye ne-77% echanekileyo ngokulandelelana, inika i-avareji ye-4-6 yeentsuku ze-4-6 isilumkiso ngaphambi kokuba kugqitywe imiqobo yeklinikhi. Xa isetyenziswe kunye nenkqubo yokwazisa ikliniki edibeneyo kwisilingo esingenasiphelo sabathathi-nxaxheba be-397, inkqubo yokubeka iliso idibaniswe nexesha elifutshane leengqungquthela kunye nokunciphisa ubunzima beempawu xa kuthelekiswa nokunyamekela okuqhelekileyo.
patientMonitoring.p4: Ukubeka iliso lokudakumba, iinkqubo ezihlalutya indlela yokuziphatha yedijithali zibonise ulungelelwaniso oluqinileyo kunye nemilinganiselo yeempawu zeklinikhi. Isicelo esingevayo sokuqokelela idatha kwiipatheni zokusetyenziswa kwe-smartphone, umsebenzi womzimba, kunye nokuziphatha kwezentlalo kubonise ulungelelwaniso lwe-0.82 namanqaku e-PHQ-9 kuphononongo olude lweenyanga ezi-6 lwabathathi-nxaxheba abangama-211 abanoxinzelelo oluphindaphindiweyo. Iimodeli zokufunda ngoomatshini eziqeqeshelwe ezi mpawu zokuziphatha ziqikelele iindlela zeempawu ezinokuchaneka okwaneleyo ukwahlula ukusonjululwa ngokuchasene noxinzelelo olubi kwi-76% yamatyala, okunokuthi kuvumele ungenelelo olungexesha.
patientMonitoring.p5: Izicelo zokujonga ukuphazamiseka kokutya zisebenzise ukufota ngokutya kunye nohlalutyo lombono wekhompyuter kunye nedatha yokuziphatha ukulandelela iimpawu kunye nokuziphatha okusemngciphekweni omkhulu. Kuphononongo olulingwayo lwabantu abali-157 abane-bulimia nervosa, inkqubo ye-AI ehlalutya umxholo wokutya, iipatheni zokutya, kunye nezalathi zokuziphatha zembuyekezo ezichongwe ngokuchanekileyo i-83% yeziganeko zokuphinda ziphinde zibuyele ngokusekelwe kwii-biomarkers zedijithali zodwa, xa kuthelekiswa ngokufanelekileyo namanyathelo okuzixela. Ukudityaniswa kunye nongenelelo olulungelelanisiweyo lwexesha nje lubonise ubungqina bokuqala bokunciphisa iziqendu zokuzihlamba ngokubonelela ngenkxaso kumanqaku ezigqibo ezibalulekileyo.
patientMonitoring.p6: Kuzo zonke ezi zicelo, ukusebenzisana komsebenzisi kunye neenkxalabo zabucala ibe yimiceli mngeni ephambili. Izifundo ezizalisekisa ukwabelana ngedatha elawulwa ngumsebenzisi, iinkcazo ze-algorithm ecacileyo, kunye nokubonakaliswa okucacileyo kwenzuzo kuye kwafikelela awona mazinga aphakamileyo okuzibandakanya, kunye ne-71% yabathathi-nxaxheba abaqhubeka nokusetyenziswa rhoqo kwiinyanga ezi-6 +. Ngokucacileyo, iinkxalabo malunga nemfihlo zibonakala zincitshisiwe xa abasebenzisi bebona izibonelelo zempilo ezibambekayo kunye nokugcina ulawulo lokusetyenziswa kwedatha.

discussion.title: Ingxoxo
discussion.text:
Uphononongo lwethu lobungqina obukhoyo bubonisa ukuba izicelo ze-AI kwimpilo yengqondo ziye zaqhubela phambili zisuka kwizinto ezinokwenzeka zethiyori ukuya kwizixhobo eziqinisekisiweyo zeklinikhi ezineempembelelo ezinokulinganiswa ekuhloleni ukuchaneka, ukunikezelwa kwonyango, kunye nokubeka iliso kwimeko. Imixholo eliqela engundoqo ivela kwiziphumo ezidityanelweyo.

Okokuqala, iindlela zemultimodal zihlala zisebenza ngakumbi kwiinkqubo zendlela enye kuzo zonke izicelo. Ukudityaniswa kohlalutyo lweelwimi, ukubekwa kweliso kwindlela yokuziphatha, imiqondiso yendalo, kunye nolwazi lomxholo kudala umfanekiso obanzi wemeko yengqondo kunawo nawuphi na umlinganiselo womntu. Oku kubonakalisa ubume obuntsonkothileyo, obuneenkalo ezininzi zeemeko zempilo yengqondo, ezibonakala kuyo yonke imimandla yokuqonda, yeemvakalelo, yokuziphatha, neyeyomzimba. Uphuhliso lwexesha elizayo kufuneka luqhubeke nokugxininisa ukudityaniswa kwemithombo yedatha ehambelanayo kwizicwangciso-nkqubo zovavanyo ezihambelanayo.

Okwesibini, ubungqina buxhasa imodeli ye-hybrid apho i-AI yandisa kunokuba ithathe indawo yoogqirha babantu. Eyona mpumelelo iphumeleleyo isikhundla i-AI njengamandla ophindaphinda ubuchwephesha beklinikhi-ukwandisa ukufikelela, ukuphucula ukusebenza kakuhle, ukwenza uvavanyo oluqhubekayo ngakumbi, kunye nokuxhasa ubungqina obusekelwe kubungqina. Umanyano lonyango phakathi kwesigulana kunye nomboneleli luhlala lusembindini wokhathalelo lwempilo yengqondo olusebenzayo, kwaye itekhnoloji ibonakala isebenza kakhulu xa iphuculwa kunokuba izame ukuthatha indawo yolu budlelwane.

Okwesithathu, ubuqu buvela njengento ebalulekileyo ekusebenzeni. Iimeko zempilo yengqondo zibonisa ukungafani okukhulu kwinkcazo, ukuqhubela phambili, kunye nokuphendula unyango. Iinkqubo ze-AI ezikwazi ukulungelelanisa kwiiprofayili zeempawu zomntu ngamnye, izinto ozikhethayo, kunye neepatheni zokuphendula ziye zabonisa iziphumo eziphezulu xa kuthelekiswa nobukhulu obufanayo-bonke iindlela. Oku kuhambelana nentshukumo ebanzi eya kunyango lwengqondo oluchanekileyo, apho ungenelelo lulungelelaniswe neeprofayili ze-biopsychosocial.

Ngaphandle kolu phuhliso luthembisayo, imiceli mngeni ebalulekileyo ihleli ekuguquleleni inkqubela phambili yophando kuqeqesho lwezonyango. Izithintelo eziphambili ziquka:

I-algorithmic bias kunye neenkxalabo zokwenzeka ngokubanzi: Iinkqubo ezininzi ziphuhlisiwe kwaye zaqinisekiswa kubantu abalingana ngokwentelekiso, kuphakamisa imibuzo malunga nokusebenza kumaqela ahlukeneyo abantu. Ubungqina bokuqala bubonisa ukuba ezinye ii-algorithms zisebenza ngokwahlukileyo kwiimeko zenkcubeko, isini, kunye nemvelaphi yobuhlanga / yobuhlanga. Ngelixa umsebenzi wakutsha nje sele uqalisile ukulungisa le yantlukwano ngokusebenzisa ulwazi oluthe kratya loqeqesho kunye nemigangatho yereferensi yolwazi lwenkcubeko, ukuqinisekisa ukusebenza ngokulinganayo kuhlala kungumngeni oqhubekayo.

Ubungqina obuncinane bexesha elide: Nangona uphando lwexesha elifutshane lubonisa iziphumo ezithembisayo, kukho ukunqongophala kwedatha yokulandelela ixesha elide malunga nokuzibandakanya okuzinzileyo, iziphumo zonyango oluhlala ixesha elide, kunye nemiphumo engalindelekanga yokungenelela kwe-AI. Ubume obukhawulezayo bokuvela kwetekhnoloji ye-AI yodlula ixesha lesiqhelo lophando lweklinikhi olude, idala isithuba sobungqina obuzingileyo.

Imingeni yokudibanisa: Ubugcisa, ukuhamba komsebenzi, kunye nezithintelo zenkcubeko zinzima ukudityaniswa kwezixhobo ze-AI kwiinkqubo ezikhoyo zeklinikhi. Ukuphunyezwa ngempumelelo kufuna ingqalelo ekuhambeni komsebenzi weklinikhi, ukudibanisa kunye neerekhodi zezempilo ze-elektroniki, iindima ezicacileyo kunye noxanduva, izikhokelo zoxanduva, kunye neemodeli zokubuyisela. Eyona nkqubela phambili yobugcisa inyanzelisayo inokusilela ekufezekiseni isakhono sazo ngaphandle kokuqwalaselwa ngenyameko kule miba yophumezo.

Iingqwalasela zabucala kunye nokhuseleko: Idatha yempilo yengqondo iphakathi kwezona nkcukacha zinobuntununtunu. Ngelixa iindlela zobugcisa ezifana nokufunda okudibeneyo kunye nokwahluka kobumfihlo kunceda ukujongana nezi zinto zixhalabisayo, izikhokelo zolawulo ezipheleleyo zokuphatha idatha kwimpilo yengqondo ye-AI zihlala zingaphuhliswanga. Ukulinganisa izibonelelo zeendlela eziqhutywa yidatha kunye nokhuseleko lwabucala olomeleleyo lumele umngeni oqhubekayo.

Ukungaqiniseki ngokomthetho: Indawo yolawulo lwe-AI kwimpilo yengqondo isavela. Izikhokelo zangoku ezilungiselelwe izixhobo zonyango zemveli azinako ukujongana ngokwaneleyo neempawu ezizodwa zeenkqubo ze-AI eziguquguqukayo eziqhubeka nokufunda ekuhanjisweni. Ukuqulunqa imigangatho efanelekileyo yokuqinisekisa, iimfuno zokubeka iliso, kunye nohlaziyo lwemigaqo yeenkqubo zokufunda kuya kubaluleka ekuqaliseni izinto ezintsha.

Le mingeni nangona kunjalo, ubungqina buxhasa uphuhliso oluqhubekayo kunye nokuphunyezwa ngokucokisekileyo kwezicelo ze-AI ezibonisa inzuzo yeklinikhi, amanyathelo okhuseleko afanelekileyo, kunye nokuqwalaselwa kweengcamango zokuziphatha. Amandla okwandisa ukufikelela kukhathalelo lwempilo yengqondo-ingakumbi kubantu abangagcinwanga kakuhle abajongene nokunqongophala kwababoneleli-lubonisa ingqiqo enyanzelisayo yokuqaliswa kwezinto ezintsha kule ntsimi.

conclusion.title: Ukuqukumbela
conclusion.text:
Izicelo zobukrelekrele bokwenziwa kwimpilo yengqondo ziye zaqhubela phambili kakhulu kule minyaka ilishumi idlulileyo, zisuka kwiingqikelelo zethiyori ukuya kwizixhobo eziqinisekisiweyo ngokweklinikhi ezibonisa ukusebenza ngempumelelo kuyo yonke inkxaso yoxilongo, unikezelo lonyango, ukubekwa esweni kwesigulana, kunye nohlalutyo lokuxela kwangaphambili. Ubungqina obuhlaziywe kweli phepha bubonisa ukuba obu buchwepheshe bunamandla okwenene okujongana nemingeni ebalulekileyo kukhathalelo lwempilo yengqondo, kubandakanywa nokufikelela kwimida, imiqobo yezibonelelo, kunye nesidingo seendlela eziqhubekayo kunye nezomntu ngamnye zokuvavanya kunye nokungenelela.

Imigaqo emininzi engundoqo kufuneka ikhokele uphuhliso lwexesha elizayo kunye nokuphunyezwa. Okokuqala, i-AI kufuneka yandise kwaye yandise ubuchwephesha beklinikhi yabantu kunokuba izame ukutshintsha ubudlelwane obubalulekileyo bonyango phakathi komnikezeli kunye nesigulana. Okwesibini, iindlela ze-multimodal ezidibanisa imithombo yedatha eyahlukeneyo zibonelela ngowona mfanekiso ubanzi kunye nochanekileyo wemeko yempilo yengqondo. Okwesithathu, izakhono zobuntu ezilungelelanisa iimfuno zomntu ngamnye, ukhetho, kunye neepatheni zokuphendula zingundoqo ekuphumezeni iziphumo ezilungileyo. Okwesine, ukuqwalasela ngenyameko ukulunga kwe-algorithm, ukuqinisekiswa okuselubala kubantu abahlukeneyo, kunye nokubeka iliso okuqhubekayo kwizinto ezinokuthi zibe kho zibalulekile ekuphunyezweni okulinganayo.

Nangona imingeni ebalulekileyo ihleli-kubandakanywa nokudityaniswa kokuhamba komsebenzi weklinikhi, ukukhuselwa kwangasese, izikhokelo zokulawula, kunye nophuhliso lobungqina bexesha elide-iinzuzo ezinokubakho ziqinisekisa ukuba uphando oluqhubekayo kunye nokuphunyezwa kweklinikhi ngokucophelela kweenkqubo eziqinisekisiweyo. Umsantsa wonyango lwengqondo echaphazela izigidi kwihlabathi jikelele ufuna iindlela ezintsha ezinokwandisa ukufikelela kukhathalelo olusekwe kubungqina.

Ukujonga phambili, silindele iindlela ezininzi ezithembisayo zentsimi. Ukudityaniswa kwedatha ye-genomic kunye nenye yebhayoloji kunye namanyathelo okuziphatha kunye nengqondo inokwenza ukuba kucaciswe ngokuchanekileyo iiprofayili zomngcipheko womntu ngamnye kunye neempendulo zokuphendula unyango. Iindlela zokufunda ezidityanelweyo ezivumela uphuhliso oluyimodeli kuwo onke amaziko ngaphandle kokubeka kwindawo enye idatha enovakalelo inokujongana neenkxalabo zabucala ngelixa ivumela iiseti zoqeqesho ezihlukeneyo nezizimele. Iimodeli zentsebenziswano zeNoveli zabantu-AI ezenza amandla ahlukeneyo onyango kunye nobukrelekrele bokwenziwa buvelise iziphumo eziphezulu xa kuthelekiswa nokuba yodwa.

Njengoko obu buchwepheshe buqhubeka nokuguquka, ukugcina imbono elungeleleneyo kubalulekile-ukuvuma zombini amandla amakhulu e-AI yokuphucula ukhathalelo lwengqondo kunye nokubaluleka okubalulekileyo koqhagamshelwano lwabantu, ubulumko bekliniki, kunye neendlela ezijoliswe kumntu. Ngophuhliso olucingisisiweyo, ukuqinisekiswa okungqongqo, kunye nokuphunyezwa ngononophelo, i-AI inamandla okuba sisixhobo esibalulekileyo ekujonganeni nomthwalo wehlabathi jikelele wokugula ngengqondo kunye nokuqhubela phambili injongo yokwenza unyango lwengqondo olusebenzayo lufikeleleke kubo bonke abaludingayo.

hero.title: VirtualMD.app
hero.subtitle: Vula amandla akho empilo ngeVirtualMD.app. Qhagamshelana nabakhokheli be-AI abaqeqeshwe kwiMpilo Qete yaseNtshona, iMpilo yesiNtu yamaTshayina, kunye nobunye ubugcisa bezempilo-zonke kwincoko enye. Fumana ulwazi lomntu siqu 24/7 kwaye ulawule impilo yakho. Olu lukhathalelo lwempilo, lucingelwe kwakhona.

whyUs.title: Kutheni ukhetha iVirtualMD.app kuhambo lwakho lokuPhila?

personalTeam.title: Iqela lakho lobuqu
personalTeam.text: Khetha iqela lakho labacebisi bezempilo be-AI. Fumana ulwazi oluvela kwiMpilo yaseNtshona, iMpilo yesiNtu yamaTshayina, kunye nobuchule bempilo ehambelanayo.

aiNavigator.title: I-AI-Powered Personal Navigator yakho
aiNavigator.text: Umhambisi wakho wezempilo we-AI ukhokelela kowona lwazi lufanelekileyo lwezempilo kunye nezicwangciso, ukuguqulela ulwazi oluvela kubacebisi bethu abakhethekileyo be-AI ukuya kwiingcebiso ezisebenzayo kuwe.

empoweringChoices.title: Ukuxhobisa ukuKhetha kweMpilo
empoweringChoices.text: Fumana iimbono ezicacileyo, ezinokuthatheka, zikunika amandla okwenza izigqibo ezizizo ngempilo yakho.

easyToUse.title: Kulula ukuyisebenzisa
easyToUse.text: Iqonga lethu lenzelwe intsebenziswano ecacileyo. Qhagamshelana nezikhokelo ze-AI kwaye ujonge iindlela zempilo ngaphandle kobunzima.

advancedTechnology.title: Revolutionary Advanced Technology
advancedTechnology.text: Yiba namava esoftware yethu ebukhali, eyilelwe ukwandisa intsebenziswano phakathi kokufuna ukwazi kwabantu kunye nokuqonda okuqhutywa yi-AI.

dynamicEnsemble.title: Dynamic AI Ensemble:
dynamicEnsemble.text: I-AI yethu yokucwangcisa ngobukrelekrele idibanisa ulwazi oluvela kuluhlu olwahlukeneyo lwezikhokelo zempilo ze-AI-ethatha iMpilo yaseNtshona, iMpilo yesiNtu yaseTshayina, kunye nokunye-ukulungisa imibuzo yakho ethile ngexesha lokwenyani.

holisticUnderstanding.title: Ukuqonda ngokubanzi:
holisticUnderstanding.text: I-AI yethu itolika amagalelo ahlukeneyo-umbhalo, okanye imifanekiso yenkqubela-phambili yomzimba wakho, okanye ungeniso kwijenali yempilo-epheleleyo, imbono etyebileyo yempilontle.

rapidAccess.title: Ufikelelo oluKhawulezayo kwiziKhokelo ze-AI:
rapidAccess.text: Qhagamshelana ngoko nangoko kunye namakhulu ezikhokelo zempilo ezikhethekileyo ze-AI kunye nempendulo yomzuzwana.

reliableInteractions.title: Unxibelelwano oluthembekileyo:
reliableInteractions.text: Ukhuseleko oluzenzekelayo luqinisekisa amava agudileyo, angenasiphazamiso, nokuba isikhokelo se-AI sifuna umzuzu wokuhlaziya kwakhona.

insightfulLogs.title: Iilog zeNxulumano eziQinisayo:
insightfulLogs.text: Unxibelelwano lweseshoni lulogiwe ukuxhasa uphuculo oluqhubekayo kunye nophuhliso lolwazi lwabakhokeli bethu be-AI.

technology.title: Itekhnoloji yethu yenguqu
technology.description1: I-VirtualMD.app isebenzisa iindlela zokucula ezibukhali. Inkqubo yethu iqinisekisa ukuba imibuzo yakho iyazuza kwikhorasi yezikhokelo ze-AI, ukutsalwa kulwazi lwezonyango lwaseNtshona, imigaqo yeNdalo yaseTshayina yokuPhila, inzululwazi yezondlo, ubuchule bokucinga, izicwangciso zokufaneleka, kunye nokunye, ukubonelela ngowona mbono ubanzi.
technology.description2: Injini yethu yokuqiqa ephucukileyo idibanisa ulwazi oluphuma kumbhalo wakho, iilog ezibonwayo, kunye nenye idatha yokuphila kakuhle, ibonelela ngezimvo ezipheleleyo ezingakwaziyo ukuphindaphinda iindlela zemveli.
technology.description3: Ngethala leencwadi elibanzi, elifikelelekayo ngoko nangoko lwezikhokelo zempilo ye-AI kunye neeprothokholi zonxibelelwano ezomeleleyo, siqinisekisa ukubandakanyeka okungaguqukiyo, okukumgangatho ophezulu kuyo nayiphi na indawo.
technology.description4: Lonke unxibelelwano lufakwe ngononophelo, luphucula ukungafihli kunye nokondla inguqu eqhubekayo yokusebenza kweqonga lethu kunye nomgangatho wokuqonda.

cta.title: Ngaba ukulungele ukwenza utshintsho kwiMpilo yakho?
cta.subtitle: Joyina i-VirtualMD.app intshukumo kwaye ufumane ixesha elitsha lofikelelo kwiingcebiso zempilo. Thatha inyathelo lokuqala eliya ekubeni unamandla ngakumbi, unolwazi, kwaye udlamke. Phonononga iindlela ezahlukeneyo zokujonga i-AI kunye nesiseko sethu solwazi lwezempilo.

dermatologyaiWhitepaper.title: iziko
dermatologyaiWhitepaper.content2:
s ukulinganisa (ukuthembeka kwamanqaku okuzithemba) kunye nokuchazwa (ukukwazi ukugqamisa imimandla yemifanekiso efanelekileyo ekwazisa ukuxilongwa).

Ukugcinwa kwedatha yedatha kunika imingeni ekhethekileyo: ukwahluka ekukhanyeni, ukubeka, kunye nomgangatho womfanekiso kunokuchaphazela kakhulu ukusebenza kwe-algorithmic. Uninzi lweenkqubo ziqeqeshelwa ukuqokelelwa kwemifanekiso ye-retrospective evela kwiiklinikhi ze-dermatology, ezizisa i-spectrum bias enokubakho - imifanekiso ayinakumela uluhlu olupheleleyo lweentetho kwizicwangciso zokunakekelwa kweprayimari. Iimodeli ezisisiphumo ziye zaqinisekiswa ngeeseti zovavanyo lokubambela, ukuqinisekiswa kwangaphandle kwiiseti zedatha ezizimeleyo, kwaye ngokwandayo ngovavanyo olulindelekileyo lwezonyango oluthelekisa iingcebiso ze-AI kwizigqibo zedermatologist kunye nenyaniso esisiseko ye-histopathological.

Ukugcinwa kwedatha yedatha kunika imingeni ekhethekileyo: ukwahluka ekukhanyeni, ukubeka, kunye nomgangatho womfanekiso kunokuchaphazela kakhulu ukusebenza kwe-algorithmic. Uninzi lweenkqubo ziqeqeshelwa ukuqokelelwa kwemifanekiso ye-retrospective evela kwiiklinikhi ze-dermatology, ezizisa i-spectrum bias enokubakho - imifanekiso ayinakumela uluhlu olupheleleyo lweentetho kwizicwangciso zokunakekelwa kweprayimari. Iimodeli ezisisiphumo ziye zaqinisekiswa ngeeseti zovavanyo lokubambela, ukuqinisekiswa kwangaphandle kwiiseti zedatha ezizimeleyo, kwaye ngokwandayo ngovavanyo olulindelekileyo lwezonyango oluthelekisa iingcebiso ze-AI kwizigqibo zedermatologist kunye nenyaniso esisiseko ye-histopathological.
dermatologyaiWhitepaper.content4:
Ukuqiqa kwaye zijolise ingqalelo kwiimpawu ezithile zesilonda eziqinisekisa uviwo olusondeleyo. Uphononongo lufumene ukuba ukubonelela ngezi nkcazo kwandisa ukuthembela kweklinikhi kwiingcebiso ze-AI kunye nokuphucula ukusebenza kokuxilongwa komntu-AI.

Ubungqina obuvelayo bubonisa ukuba i-AI inokubona i-melanomas kumanqanaba angaphambili kunokuba ifunyanwe ngokwesiqhelo. Kuhlalutyo olujongwayo lwe-melanomas ekuqaleni yafunyaniswa gwenxa njengee-dermatologists kodwa ifakwe ngokuchanekileyo yi-AI, izilonda zihlala zibonisa iimpawu ezifihlakeleyo ezingaphantsi komda wenkxalabo yeklinikhi kodwa zayanyaniswa noguquko olubi olubi. Oku kukwazi ukufunyanwa kwangoko kunokuphucula iziphumo zokusinda, nangona izifundo ezilindelekileyo zokulandelela iziphumo zexesha elide zisaqhuba.

Iimeko ezineenkcazo ezifihlakeleyo okanye eziguquguqukayo, ezifana nokuqhuma kweziyobisi okanye iimeko ze-autoimmune zakuqala, zibonise amazinga aphantsi okuchaneka (70-75%), ebonisa iindawo ezifuna ukulungiswa okuqhubekayo kwe-algorithm.

Ngokuphawulekayo, inkqubo ye-multimodal ephuhliswe nguGoogle edibanisa idatha yomfanekiso kunye neempawu ezichazwe ngesigulane zibonise uphuculo olongezelelweyo, ukufezekisa ukuchaneka kwe-1 ephezulu ye-93% kwiimeko eziqhelekileyo ze-26. Ukudityaniswa kwedatha engeyiyo eyomfanekiso kubonakalise ukuxabiseka ngokukodwa ekwahluleni iimeko ezifanayo ngokubonwayo ezineempawu ezahlukeneyo ezinxulumeneyo, ezinjengokwahlula i-dermatitis yokunxibelelana ne-allergic kwi-irritant contact dermatitis ngokusekwe kubukhali obuxeliweyo bokurhawuzelela kunye nembali yokuvezwa.

Kwi-dermatology yabantwana, apho ukufikelela kwiingcali kuthintelwe ngokukodwa, iinkqubo ze-AI zibonise isithembiso kwiimeko eziqhelekileyo zesikhumba somntwana. Imodeli ekhethekileyo yabantwana izuze ukuchaneka kwe-90.1% kwiimeko ezibandakanya i-atopic dermatitis, i-molluscum contagiosum, kunye neempawu zokuzalwa eziqhelekileyo. Ngokucacileyo, inkqubo ibonise uvakalelo lwe-95.2% lokubona isifo sesandla sonyawo-somlomo ngexesha lokuqhambuka, iphakamisa izicelo ezinokubakho kuhlolo lwempilo yoluntu.
