pathologyaiWhitepaper.title: I-AI kwi-Pathology: Ukuqhubela phambili ukuChaneka koDiagnostic kunye nokusebenza kakuhle
pathologyaiWhitepaper.subtitle: Uphononongo olubanzi lwezicelo zobukrelekrele bokwenziwa kwi-anatomic kunye ne-clinical pathology

authors.names: Ron Rubin, PhD kunye noSandy Miles

abstract.title: Abstract
abstract.content: I-Artificial Intelligence (AI) iye yavela njengeteknoloji yokuguqula kwi-pathology, ebonisa amandla okuphucula ukuchaneka kokuxilonga, ukuveliswa kwakhona, kunye nokusebenza kakuhle komsebenzi. Eli phepha elimhlophe livavanya imeko yangoku ye-AI kwi-pathology esekelwe kwizifundo zamva nje zokuqinisekiswa kweklinikhi, ukukhutshwa kokulawulwa, kunye nokuphunyezwa kwehlabathi langempela. Siphonononga ezona zicelo ziphambili zibandakanya ukufumanisa umhlaza, ukuhlelwa, uvavanyo oluqikelelwayo, kunye nokwenza ngcono ukuhamba komsebenzi. Iziphumo eziphambili ziquka amazinga ovakalelo lwe-95-99% yokufunyanwa komhlaza kwiinkqubo ezininzi zamalungu, ukunciphisa kakhulu ukuhluka kwe-interobserver, kunye nokunciphisa umthwalo omkhulu womsebenzi. Nangona ukusebenza kwezobugcisa kuye kwafikelela kumanqanaba amkelekileyo ekliniki kwizicelo ezininzi, imingeni yokuphunyezwa ihleli ibandakanya ukuqwalaselwa kokulawula, ukuhlanganiswa kokuhamba komsebenzi, kunye nesidingo sokuqinisekiswa okuqhubekayo. Sinikezela ngeengcebiso ezisekelwe kubungqina kumasebe e-pathology aqwalasela ukwamkelwa kwe-AI, sigxininisa ukubaluleka kokukhethwa kwe-case-case-case-case, ukuphunyezwa ngezigaba, kunye nokubekwa kweliso kokusebenza okuqhubekayo. Ubungqina bubonisa ukuba i-AI iya kwandisa kunokuba ithathe indawo yeengcali zezifo, isebenza njengesixhobo esinamandla sokwandisa amandla okuxilongwa kunye nokulawula iimfuno ezikhulayo zomsebenzi.

introduction.title: Intshayelelo
introduction.content:
Inkalo ye-pathology ijongene nemingeni engazange ibonwe ngaphambili: ukwanda kwamatyala, ubunzima obukhulayo beendlela zokuxilonga, ukunqongophala kwabasebenzi, kunye noxinzelelo lwamaxesha okutshintsha ngokukhawuleza. Kwangaxeshanye, ukuchaneka kwempilo kufuna uhlalutyo oluthe kratya lwezicubu, uvavanyo lwe-biomarker yobungakanani, kunye nokudityaniswa kweziphumo ze-morphologic kunye nedatha yemolekyuli. Ngokuchasene nale mvelaphi, ubukrelekrele bokwenziwa (AI) buye bavela njengesisombululo esinokubakho sokuphucula ukwenziwa kwe-pathology.

Ngelixa i-AI kwimifanekiso yezonyango ifumene ingqwalasela ebalulekileyo, i-pathology ibonisa amathuba akhethekileyo kunye nemingeni. Ngokungafaniyo neradiyoloji apho i-AI ihlalutya imifanekiso ye-anatomy engaguqukiyo, i-pathology AI kufuneka itolike amacandelo ezicubu ezincinci ezimele ubume obuntsonkothileyo obunemilinganiselo emithathu encitshisiweyo ukuya kwizilayidi ezinemilinganiselo emibini. Umthamo wedatha opheleleyo uyothusa-umfanekiso opheleleyo wesilayidi unokuqulatha iibhiliyoni zeepikseli, ezifuna iindlela ezintsonkothileyo zokubala.

Eli phepha elimhlophe libonelela ngophononongo olubanzi lwezicelo ze-AI kwi-pathology, kugxininise kubuchwephesha obuye bafumana ukuqinisekiswa okungqongqo kweklinikhi. Sivavanya isiseko sobungqina, sixoxe ngokuqwalaselwa kokuphunyezwa, kwaye sinikeze isikhokelo esisebenzayo kumasebe e-pathology avavanya ukwamkelwa kwe-AI. Uhlalutyo lwethu lusekelwe kwizifundo eziphononongwe ngoontanga, izigqibo zolawulo, kunye nedatha yokuphunyezwa kwehlabathi lokwenyani.

methods.title: Iindlela/uBugcisa
methods.content:
Iisistim ze-AI ye-pathology yanamhlanje zisebenzisa ulwakhiwo lokufunda olunzulu, ngokuyintloko uthungelwano lwe-neural ye-convolutional (CNNs), ukuhlalutya imifanekiso yesilayidi esipheleleyo efakwe kwidijithali kwisisombululo esiphezulu (ngokuqhelekileyo yi-20-40× magnification). Ezi nkqubo ziqeqeshelwa kwiiseti zedatha enkulu yemifanekiso ephawulweyo, ehlala ifuna amanqakwana engcali yenzululwazi yezifo ukuseka inyaniso esisiseko. Zimbini iindlela eziphambili ze-AI ezilawulayo: ukufunda okubekw’ iliso kusetyenziswa inqanaba lommandla okanye amagqabantshintshi enqanaba lesilayidi, kunye nokufunda okuphantsi kweliso elibukhali elifuna kuphela uxilongo lwenqanaba lemeko. Uqeqesho ngokuqhelekileyo lubandakanya iinkqubo ezinamanqanaba amaninzi, okokuqala ukufumanisa imimandla enomdla ekukhuliseni okuphantsi, emva koko kuhlelwe le mimandla ekukhuliseni okuphezulu ukuchonga iipathologies ezithile.

Iimethrikhi eziphambili zokusebenza ziquka ubuntununtunu (umlinganiselo wezinto ezilungileyo ezichongiweyo ngokuchanekileyo), ukucaciswa (umlinganiselo wezinto ezingalunganga ezichongiweyo ngokuchanekileyo), ummandla ophantsi kwegophe leempawu zokusebenza zomamkeli (AUC), kunye nemilinganiselo yesivumelwano efana nekappa kaCohen. Ukuqinisekiswa kweklinikhi kufuna uvavanyo kwiiseti zedatha ezizimeleyo ezivela kumaziko amaninzi ukuqinisekisa ukufezekiswa ngokubanzi kwizigulane ezahlukeneyo, iindlela zokulungiselela izicubu, kunye nezixhobo zokuskena.

digitalPathologyOverview.title: Digital Pathology Overview
digitalPathologyOverview.content:
I-Digital pathology ifumene ukukhula okubonakalayo, kunye nemarike yehlabathi kuqikelelwa ukuba ifikelele kwi-1.4 yezigidigidi zeedola ngo-2027. Ukwamkelwa kwaselabhoratri kuye kwakhawulezisa, ngakumbi kumaziko onyango ezemfundo kunye neelebhu zezalathiso apho imiqobo yolawulo yokuqala yoyisiwe. Kwi-2017, i-FDA yacima inkqubo yokuqala ye-imaging yesilayidi yokuxilongwa kweprayimari (i-Philips IntelliSite Pathology Solution), ilandelwa yi-clearance eyongezelelweyo kuquka i-Leica Aperio AT2 DX kunye ne-Aperio GT 450 DX. Ezi nkqubo zenza isiseko sedijithali esiyimfuneko kwi-computational pathology kunye nezicelo ze-AI.

I-AI kwi-pathology yaqala ngokugxila kwizicelo kwiimeko ezilinganiselweyo ze-histology kodwa iye yanda ukuze ibandakanye iintlobo ezininzi zeethishu kunye nemisebenzi yokuxilonga. Iindlela zokubala ziye zavela ngokufanayo kukufunda koomatshini bemveli abaneempawu zobunjineli ukuya ekupheleni ukuya esiphelweni ukufunda okunzulu okukwaziyo ukukhupha iimpawu ngokuthe ngqo kwidatha yepixel. Iiseti zedatha zoqeqesho zikhule ukusuka kumakhulu ukuya kumakhulu amawaka ezilayidi, nto leyo eyenza ukuba ujikelezo olomelele ngakumbi kubantu abaguli kunye neemeko zokuskena.

cancerDetection.title: Ukufunyanwa koMhlaza
cancerDetection.content:
Kwi-oncologic pathology, iinkqubo ze-AI zibonise ukuchaneka okuphawulekayo ekufumaneni izifo ezahlukeneyo. Ngomhlaza wesibeleko, uPantanowitz et al. ivavanye i-algorithm ye-AI (i-Paige Prostate) kwisifundo sokuqinisekiswa kweendawo ezininzi ezibandakanya iislayidi ze-549 ezivela kwizigulane ze-100. I-AI ibonise ubuntununtunu obungama-98.8% kunye ne-97.3% yokuqonda ngokuthe ngqo ukufumanisa umhlaza, iqhuba kakuhle kakhulu izazinzulu zezifo ngokubanzi ngakumbi kwiimeko ezicela umngeni (i-Lancet Digital Health, 2020). Ngokufanayo, uCampanella et al. iphuhlise indlela yokufunda ephantsi kweliso elibukhali eqeqeshelwe ngaphezulu kwe-15,000 yesilayidi se-prostate ephumelele i-AUC ye-0.98 yokubhaqwa komhlaza (uNyango lweNdalo, ngo-2019).

Kumhlaza wamabele, imingeni ye-CAMELYON ibonelele ngobungqina obubalulekileyo bokusebenza kwe-AI ekufumaneni i-metastases kwii-lymph nodes. Kwi-CAMELYON16, i-algorithm engcono kakhulu iphumelele i-AUC ye-0.994, idlula ukusebenza kwee-pathologists ezisebenza phantsi kweengxaki zexesha (AUC 0.810) (JAMA, 2017). Ezi nkqubo zibona iiseli zomhlaza ezinokuphoswa ngexesha lokuphononongwa ngesandla, ngakumbi i-micrometastases kunye neeseli zethumba ezizimeleyo.
cancerDetection.content2:
Ngaphaya kwezi zomhlaza ziqhelekileyo, iinkqubo ze-AI ziphuhliselwe ezinye izifo ezininzi. Kwi-pathology ye-lung, i-algorithms yokufunda enzulu inokwahlula i-adenocarcinoma kwi-squamous cell carcinoma ene-97% ngokuchanekileyo kwaye ichonge ukuguqulwa kofuzo (umzekelo, ukuguqulwa kwe-EGFR) kwiimpawu ze-histomorphological (Umhlaza weNdalo, i-2020). Kwi-colorectal pathology, i-AI inokubona i-adenomas, ihlele i-histologic subtypes, kwaye ichonge isimo sokungazinzi kwe-microsatellite ngokuthe ngqo kwiislayidi ze-H & E ezinovakalelo oludlula i-95% (J Pathol, 2020).

Iinzuzo zokufunyanwa kwe-AI zandisa ngaphaya kobuntununtunu. Uphononongo luhlala lubonisa ukwahluka kwe-interrobserver encitshisiweyo xa ii-pathologists zinoncedo lwe-AI. Ngokomzekelo, uSteiner et al. ibonise ukuba uncedo lwe-AI lunyuse isivumelwano seengcali zezifo ngomgangatho wereferensi ukusuka kuma-93.3% ukuya kuma-95.8% wokufumanisa umhlaza webele wemetastasis (Am J Surg Pathol, 2018). Oku kuhambelana okunyukayo kuneempembelelo ezibalulekileyo zokuxilonga amatyala asemdeni kunye nokulungelelanisa ukhathalelo kuwo wonke amaziko.

gradingClassification.title: UHlelo noHlelo
gradingClassification.content:
Ngaphandle kokufunyanwa komhlaza wesibini, iinkqubo ze-AI zenze inkqubela phambili ebonakalayo kwimisebenzi entsonkothileyo ebandakanya ukuchwetheza kunye nokuhlelwa. Okona kubaluleke kakhulu, ukuhlelwa kwe-Gleason okuzenzekelayo komhlaza wedlala lobudoda kuye kwaba lugqaliselo lophando olunzulu ngenxa yokwahluka okwaziwayo kwe-interobserver koluphawu lubalulekileyo lwe-prognostic. Bulten et al. iphuhlise inkqubo yokufunda enzulu enika amanqaku e-Gleason aneenkcukacha ngomsebenzi olingana neengcali zezifo ze-urologic (i-kappa = 0.62 vs. 0.57) kunye nokufikelela kwinqanaba leengcali ze-genitourinary (kappa = 0.73) (Lancet Oncology, 2020). Ngokufanayo, uStröm et al. inike ingxelo ngenkqubo ye-AI efikelela kwinqanaba le-pathologist nge-AUC ye-0.98 yokwahlula iindawo ezinomhlaza kunye ne-AUC ye-0.85-0.93 yokuhlela amabanga ahlukeneyo e-Gleason (IEEE TMI, 2020).

Kwi-pathology yezintso, iinkqubo ze-AI ziye zaphuhliswa ukuba zihlele iindidi ezahlukeneyo ze-renal cell carcinoma nge> 95% ngokuchanekileyo kwiindidi ezine eziqhelekileyo (Nat Mach Intell, 2019). Ngamaqhuqhuva e-thyroid, i-AI inokwahlula i-benign kwiimpawu ezinobungozi kunye nobuthathaka be-90-99% ngokuxhomekeke kuhlobo oluthile lomhlaza we-thyroid (JAMA Network Open, 2019). Ezi zicelo zandisa ngaphaya kokuhlelwa komhlaza - i-AI ibonise isithembiso ekuhleleni izifo ezivuthayo (umzekelo, ukuqina kwesifo sofuba), ukulinganisa i-immune cell cell infiltrates (i-tumor microenvironment assessment), kunye nokulinganisa iimpawu ze-morphologic eziqikelela impendulo yonyango.

workflowOptimization.title: UkuPhuculwa koMsebenzi
workflowOptimization.content:
Ngaphandle kokuchaneka koxilongo, i-AI ibonelela ngesakhono esibalulekileyo sokwenziwa komsebenzi we-pathology. Uphuculo oluphambili lokuhamba komsebenzi kukuhlolwa kwangaphambili ukubeka phambili amatyala kunye nokunciphisa ixesha elichithwe kwiisampuli ezintle okanye eziqhelekileyo. Ho et al. ibonise ukuba i-AI yokujonga kwangaphambili i-prostate biopsies inokunciphisa umsebenzi we-pathologist nge-30-50% ngelixa igcina ukuchaneka kokuxilonga (i-Mod Pathol, i-2021). Ngokufanayo, uDa Silva et al. ifumene ukuba i-AI yokuhlolwa kwangaphambili kwe-cytology yomlomo wesibeleko inokunciphisa ukuhlaziywa ngesandla ukuya kwi-40% (J Am Soc Cytopathol, 2021).

Kuvavanyo lobungakanani, iinkqubo ze-AI zenza imisebenzi yezandla edinayo enje ngokubala i-mitotic, i-tumor proportion scoring ye-PDL1, kunye ne-quantification ye-immunohistochemical stains. Kumanqaku eKi-67, uMaeda et al. ibonise ukuba inkqubo ye-AI ezenzekelayo yanciphisa ixesha lokuhlola nge-83% ngelixa igcina okanye idlula ukuchaneka kokubala ngesandla (i-Sci Rep, i-2021). Oku kuzenzekelayo kulinganisa imilinganiselo ngokwesiko ehlupheka kukuguquguquka okubanzi kwe-interobserver.

Ukufumana inkxaso yesigqibo seklinikhi, iinkqubo ze-AI zinokuchonga amatyala afuna ubuchule be-subspecialty okanye izifundo ezongezelelweyo. UChen et al. ibonise ukuba i-algorithm ye-AI inokuvavanya i-98% yamatyala esiqhelo ngelixa iflegi kuphela i-2% yokuphononongwa kwe-pathologist ephezulu, ngaphandle kwelahleko ekuchanekeni kokuxilonga (Nat Commun, 2022). Xa zidityaniswe neenkqubo zolwazi lwaselabhoratri, ezi ndlela zinganciphisa ngokumangalisayo amaxesha okutshintsha iimeko zesiqhelo ngelixa ziqinisekisa uphononongo olufanelekileyo lweengcali lwamatyala acela umngeni.

discussion.title: Ingxoxo
discussion.content:
Ubungqina obuqokelelweyo bubonisa ukuba i-AI iqhubele phambili ukusuka kwingqikelelo yophando ukuya kwitekhnoloji yebanga leklinikhi kwi-pathology. Iimetriki zokusebenza kuzo zonke izifundo ezininzi zihlala zibonisa ubuntununtunu kunye neenkcukacha ezingaphezulu kwe-90% kwizicelo ezininzi, ukukhuphisana okanye ukodlula ukusebenza komntu kwimisebenzi ethile. Nangona kunjalo, imiba emininzi ebalulekileyo ichaphazela ukutolikwa kunye nokuphunyezwa kwezi ziphumo.

Ukubaluleka kweklinikhi: I-AI ibonisa amandla athile kwimisebenzi ebandakanya ukuqondwa kwepateni kunye nobungakanani. Ukufunyaniswa komhlaza, ubuntununtunu be-AI buhlala bugqitha olo lweengcali ze-pathologists ngokubanzi, ezinokuthi zinciphise amazinga oxilongo oluphosiweyo. Kumiliselo olulindelekileyo, uPantanowitz et al. ingxelo yokuba i-AI ibone i-foci eliqela yomhlaza ekuqaleni ephoswe zii-pathologists, iqaqambisa ixabiso layo "njengomhloli wesibini" (Lancet Digital Health, 2020). Ngemisebenzi yokulinganisa, i-AI ibonelela ngeziphumo ezihambelanayo ngakumbi kuneengcali ze-pathologists, ukunciphisa ukuhluka okunokuchaphazela ulawulo lwesigulane.

Impembelelo yokuhamba komsebenzi: Ixesha le-pathologist sisixhobo esincinci esincinci, okwenza ukuba ukuhamba komsebenzi kubaluleke kakhulu. Izifundo zibonisa ukonga ixesha le-30-60% kwimisebenzi eyahlukeneyo xa usebenzisa uncedo lwe-AI. Oku kuguqulela kwiinzuzo ezibonakalayo - isebe le-pathology elisebenza nge-100 ye-prostate case ngeveki inokonga iiyure ze-15-30 ze-pathologist, ivumela ukugxila kwiimeko ezinzima ezifuna ubuchule bomntu.

Ukwahluka kwe-Iterobserver: Ukufunyanwa okuhambelanayo kwizifundo kuncitshiswe ukuguquguquka xa i-AI inceda ii-pathologists. Kuhlelo lweGleason, isivumelwano se-interobserver siqhele ukonyuka ukusuka kumaxabiso e-kappa ka-0.5-0.6 (imvumelwano ephakathi) ukuya ku-0.7-0.8 (isivumelwano esibambekayo) ngoncedo lwe-AI (Lancet Oncol, 2020). Oku kuhambelana okuphuculweyo kuneempembelelo ezibalulekileyo zokumiselwa konyango kuzo zonke izicwangciso zokuziqhelanisa ezahlukeneyo.

Ngaphandle kwezi ziphumo zithembisayo, imida ebalulekileyo ifuna ukuqwalaselwa. I-Generalizability ihlala iyinkxalabo ephambili - iinkqubo ze-AI eziqeqeshwe kwiinkcukacha ezivela kumaziko athile okanye izigulane zingaqhubeki kakuhle kwiindawo ezahlukeneyo. Imiba yobugcisa efana nokulungiselela isilayidi, iiprothokholi ezingcolisayo, kunye neempawu zesikena zinokuchaphazela ukusebenza kwe-AI. I-FDA iye yaqaphela le mingeni, incoma ukuqinisekiswa kweendawo ezininzi kwiinkqubo ze-AI ezifuna imvume yokulawula.

Umkhethe kwiseti yedatha ngomnye umba obalulekileyo. Uninzi lwe-algorithms luqeqeshwe kubemi baseNtshona kwaye lunokuqhuba ngaphantsi kwamanye amaqela eentlanga aneentetho zezifo ezahlukeneyo. Umzekelo, umhlaza wedlala lobudoda uhlala uveza iipatheni ezahlukeneyo zemophological kumadoda ase-Afrika aseMelika xa kuthelekiswa namadoda aseCaucasus, okunokuthi kuchaphazele ukusebenza kwe-algorithm ye-AI ukuba ayimelwanga ngokwaneleyo kwidatha yoqeqesho.

Ukongamela lolawulo lwe-pathology AI iyaqhubeka nokuvela. I-FDA isuse izixhobo ezininzi ze-AI-based pathology ngokusebenzisa i-De Novo kunye ne-510 (k) iindlela, ukuseka umzekelo wokuphunyezwa kweklinikhi. Ukukhutshwa kwe-FDA ye-2021 ye-Paige Prostate iphawule isiganeko esibalulekileyo njengenkqubo yokuqala ye-AI ye-pathology egunyazisiweyo yokusetyenziswa koxilongo oluphambili. Nangona kunjalo, uninzi lweesistim zicaciswa njengee-algorithms "ezitshixiweyo" ezingakwazi ukufunda okanye ukuziqhelanisa emva kokusasazwa, zidala imingeni yokugcina ukusebenza njengoko iipatheni zokuziqhelanisa ziguquka.

Ukudityaniswa nokuhamba komsebenzi osele kukho elabhoratri kubonisa imiqobo esebenzayo. Ukwamkelwa kwe-digital pathology, nangona ikhula, ihlala ingagqibekanga kuyo yonke inkqubo yezempilo. Iinkqubo ze-AI zifuna ukudityaniswa neenkqubo zolwazi lwebhubhoratri kunye namaqonga akhoyo e-digital pathology. Ukongeza, iingcali ze-pathologists zidinga uqeqesho ukuze zifake ngempumelelo iziphumo ze-AI kwinkqubo yabo yokuxilonga, ukutolika amanqaku okunokwenzeka kunye neemephu zokushisa ngokufanelekileyo.

Njengayo nayiphi na itekhnoloji evelayo, idatha yeendleko ezisebenzayo zihlala zilinganiselwe. Ukuphunyezwa kokuqala kufuna utyalo-mali olubalulekileyo kwiziseko ezingundoqo zedijithali, kodwa iinzuzo zexesha elide zingabandakanya amazinga ancitshisiweyo eempazamo, amaxesha okutshintsha ngokukhawuleza, kunye nokusetyenziswa kobutyebi ngokufanelekileyo. Iindlela zembuyekezo zeenkonzo ze-AI ezincediswa yi-pathology zisaphuhla, nto leyo eyenza ukungaqiniseki malunga nokuzinza kwemali kobu buchwepheshe.

conclusion.title: Ukuqukumbela
conclusion.content:
Ubukrelekrele bokwenziwa bubonisa ubuchwephesha besifo se-pathology, kunye nobungqina obandayo bokuba iinkqubo ze-AI zinokufezekisa ukusebenza kwenqanaba lobuchwephesha kwimisebenzi ethile yoxilongo. Ubungqina obunamandla bukhona kwizicelo kwi-oncologic pathology, ngokukodwa i-prostate kunye nomhlaza webele, apho iinkqubo ezicociweyo ze-FDA ziye zangena kwiikliniki. I-AI ibonisa amandla athile ekujonganeni nemingeni eyaziwayo kwi-pathology: inciphisa ukuhluka kwe-interrobserver, iphucula ukufunyanwa kweziphumo ezifihlakeleyo, ibeka uvavanyo lobungakanani, kwaye iphucula ukusebenza kakuhle komsebenzi.

Utshintsho olusuka kuphando ukuya ekuphunyezweni kweklinikhi luyakhawuleza, luxhaswa ngokukhula kwesakhelo solawulo kunye namava eziko. Nangona kunjalo, ukuhlanganiswa okuyimpumelelo kufuna ingqalelo kubugcisa, ukuhamba komsebenzi, kunye nokuqwalaselwa kokuqinisekiswa. Ukufumana iziphumo ezilungileyo, i-AI kufuneka iphunyezwe njengeteknoloji yokuncedisa i-pathologist kunenkqubo yokuxilongwa ngokuzimeleyo kwizicelo ezininzi. Intsebenziswano ye-pathologist-AI iphakamisa amandla ahambelanayo obuchule bomntu kunye nobuchule bokubala.

Imikhomba-ndlela yexesha elizayo ibandakanya usetyenziso olwandisiweyo kumaziko anqabileyo, uvavanyo lwe-biomarker eqikelelweyo, kunye nokudityaniswa kwedatha ye-genomic kunye ne-molecular. Ukuqinisekiswa komgangatho wexesha langempela, ukuncitshiswa kokungalingani kokuxilonga, kunye nokulungelelaniswa neepatheni zokuziqhelanisa eziguqukayo kubonisa iinjongo ezibalulekileyo. Ubungqina obuhlaziyiweyo buxhasa utyalo-mali oluqhubekayo kwiinkqubo ze-AI ye-pathology ngokuqinisekiswa okungqongqo kunye nokuphunyezwa okucingayo. Ngophuhliso olufanelekileyo lobugcisa, ukuqinisekiswa, kunye nokudityaniswa kokuhamba komsebenzi weklinikhi, i-AI inamandla okuphucula kakhulu umgangatho kunye nokusebenza kakuhle kokuxilongwa kwe-pathologic.

figure2.title: Umzobo 2. Uvakalelo kunye neNgcaciso kwi-Key Pathology Izifundo ze-AI

figure3.title: Umzobo 3. Ixesha eliqhelekileyo lokuxilongwa: I-Manual vs AI-Assisted Pathology
figure3.caption: Umthombo: Ho D, Quake SR, McCabe ERB, et al. Ubuchwephesha bokwenza uMntu kunye nokuChaneka kweyeza. Iimpawu zeBiotechnol. 2020;38(5):497-518.

figure4.title: Umzobo 4. I-Heatmap ye-AI iGqamisa iiSeli zeCancer kwi-Prostate Biopsy
figure4.caption: Isilayidi se-prostate biopsy esihlalutywe yinkqubo ye-AI egxininisa imimandla equlethe iiseli zomhlaza (obomvu → ubunzulu obutyheli). Imephu yokushisa itsala ingqalelo kwi-foci encinci ye-adenocarcinoma enokuthi ingahoywa ngexesha lokuphononongwa kwesiqhelo. Umthombo: Pantanowitz L, et al. I-algorithm yobukrelekrele bokwenziwa kokuxilongwa komhlaza wesibeleko kwimifanekiso yesilayidi esisiseko se-biopsies yenaliti: ukuqinisekiswa okumfamekileyo kweklinikhi kunye nophononongo lokusasazwa. questions.replacementForDoctor: Ngaba iVirtualMD.app ithatha indawo kagqirha wam?
questions.tryWithoutAccount: Ngaba ndingazama iVirtualMD.app ngaphandle kokwenza iakhawunti?
questions.whatMakesDifferent: Yintoni eyenza iVirtualMD yahluke kwamanye amaqonga ezempilo e-AI?

answers.whatIsVirtualMD: I-VirtualMD.app liqonga lokubonisana lezempilo elinikwe amandla nge-AI elibonelela ngesikhokelo somntu zonyango ngencoko ephucukileyo ye-AI. Iqonga lethu libonisa ngaphezulu kwe-60 yabantu bezonyango abakhethekileyo be-AI, ngalinye linobuchule obukhethekileyo kwiindawo ezahlukeneyo zokhathalelo lwempilo.
answers.replacementForDoctor: Hayi, iVirtualMD.app ayisiyondawo yokhathalelo lobuchwephesha bonyango. Uthethwano lwethu lwe-AI lwenzelwe ukubonelela ngolwazi lwezempilo, imfundo, kunye nesikhokelo sokuqala. Soloko udibana nabasebenzi bezempilo abaqeqeshiweyo ukuze uxilongwe, unyango, kunye nezigqibo zonyango.
answers.howItWorks: Ungaqala incoko nomnye wabantu bethu abakhethekileyo be-AI ngokubakhetha kwideshibhodi. Umntu ngamnye unobuchule obuthile (umzekelo, i-cardiology, i-pediatrics, impilo yengqondo) kwaye uya kubandakanyeka kwingxoxo yengxoxo ukuqonda iinkxalabo zakho kunye nokubonelela ngolwazi olufanelekileyo kunye nesikhokelo.
answers.healthInfoSecure: Ewe, sithatha ubumfihlo bedatha kunye nokhuseleko njengento ebaluleke kakhulu. Zonke iincoko ziguqulelwe ngokuntsonkothileyo, kwaye siyayithobela imithetho yokhuseleko lwedatha yezempilo. Ulwazi lwakho lwezempilo alwabelwanga nomntu wesithathu ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacileyo. Jonga iphepha lethu leMfihlo weDatha ngeenkcukacha ezithe vetshe.
answers.tryWithoutAccount: Ewe! Sinikezela ngamava ondwendwe akuvumela ukuba uzame inkonzo yethu yokubonisana ye-AI ngaphandle kokwenza iakhawunti. Iiseshoni zeendwendwe zikhawulelwe kwimiyalezo eyi-10 kwaye zibonelela ngokufikelela kumntu wethu wothethwano lwezonyango ngokubanzi.
answers.supportedLanguages: I-VirtualMD.app ixhasa iilwimi ezingaphezu kwama-30, kubandakanya isiNgesi, iSpanish, isiFrentshi, isiJamani, isiTshayina, isiJapan, isiArabhu, isiHebhere, kunye nezinye ezininzi. Iqonga lichonga ngokuzenzekelayo ulwimi lwesikhangeli sakho kwaye luhlengahlengise ngokufanelekileyo.
answers.uploadDocuments: Ewe, abasebenzisi ababhalisiweyo banokulayisha imifanekiso yezonyango kunye namaxwebhu ngexesha lokubonisana. I-AI yethu inokuhlalutya kwaye ibonelele ngemibono kwimifanekiso eyahlukeneyo yezonyango kuquka i-X-rays, i-MRIs, kunye neengxelo zelebhu. Olu phawu lunceda ukubonelela ngomxholo kunye nesikhokelo esichanekileyo.
answers.aiAccuracy: Iimodeli zethu ze-AI ziqeqeshwe kuncwadi olubanzi lwezonyango kwaye zihlaziywa ngokuqhubekayo ngolwazi lwamva nje lwezonyango. Ngelixa i-AI yethu ibonelela ngolwazi olukumgangatho ophezulu olusekwe ekuqondeni kwangoku kwezonyango, kufuneka isoloko isetyenziswa njengesixhobo esongezelelweyo ecaleni kokhathalelo lwezonyango lobuchwephesha.
answers.conversationHistory: Ewe, abasebenzisi ababhalisiweyo banokufikelela kwimbali yabo epheleleyo yencoko, kubandakanya isishwankathelo, imibhalo ekhutshelweyo, kunye nawo nawaphi na amaxwebhu ekwabelwana ngawo. Oku kunceda ukugcina ukuqhubeka kuhambo lwakho lolwazi lwezempilo kwaye kukuvumela ukuba wabelane ngeengcebiso ezifanelekileyo nababoneleli bakho bezempilo.
answers.voiceSupport: Ewe, iVirtualMD.app ixhasa zombini iteksti ukuya kwintetho kunye nokusebenza kwentetho ukuya kokubhaliweyo. Ungamamela iimpendulo ze-AI kwaye uthethe imibuzo yakho endaweni yokuchwetheza, ukwenza iqonga lifikeleleke ngakumbi kwaye lilungele ukulisebenzisa.
answers.whatMakesDifferent: I-VirtualMD.app ineempawu ezingaphezu kwama-60 zabantu abakhethekileyo bezonyango be-AI, nganye inobuchule obunzulu kwiinkalo ezithile zonyango. Iqonga lethu likwabonelela ngenkxaso yolwimi olubanzi, ukusebenzisana kwelizwi, uhlalutyo lwemifanekiso yezonyango, kunye nokugcina imigangatho engqongqo yabucala ngelixa sibonelela ngojongano olucacileyo, olufikelelekayo.
answers.cost: Sinikezela ngeendlela ezahlukeneyo zokubhalisela ukuhlangabezana neemfuno ezahlukeneyo. Abasebenzisi beendwendwe banokuzama inkonzo simahla kunye neempawu eziqingqiweyo. Abasebenzisi ababhalisiweyo bafumana ukufikelela kubo bonke abantu, iincoko ezingenasiphelo, kunye neempawu eziphambili. Nceda ujonge iphepha lethu lamaxabiso kwiinketho zobhaliso lwangoku.

gettingStarted.description: I-VirtualMD.app liqonga lokubonisana lezempilo elinikwe amandla nge-AI elibonelela ngesikhokelo somntu zonyango ngencoko ephucukileyo ye-AI. Nantsi indlela yokuqalisa:

nutrition.title: Isondlo kunye nendlela yokuphila

nutrition.firstMessage:
Mholo! NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol. Ukwenza utshintsho kwindlela yokuphila enempilo kunokuziva kunzima, kodwa uthatha inyathelo lokuqala ngokufikelela.

Ngowuphi umba wempilo yakho kunye nesondlo ongathanda ukugxila kuwo?

founders.title: Inqaku elivela kubaseki
founders.paragraph1: Sakhe le app ngethemba elinye: ukunceda ukwenza umhlaba ube yindawo enempilo ngokunikezela ukufikelela kukhokelo lwezonyango oluthembekileyo-oluxhaswe bubugcisa obusandul' ukubakho. Sisiphumo sentsebenziswano phakathi kwenzululwazi kunye norabhi, bobabini abaphuhlisi bexesha elide abaqondayo isithembiso kunye noxanduva lweli xesha litsha le-AI.
founders.paragraph2: Injongo yethu kukubonelela ngokufikelela simahla nangokupheleleyo kwiqonga kubasebenzisi bethu abasisigidi sokuqala. Sikholelwa ukuba impilo ifanele ifumaneke kumntu wonke—kungekhona kuphela kwabo banako ukuyihlawula. Njengoko iqonga likhula, sinokuzisa imirhumo yeempawu ezithile zeprimiyamu. Kodwa ngoku, sigxile ekufumaneni oku ezandleni zabo bayidinga kakhulu.
founders.paragraph3: Ecaleni kweyamva nje kwisayensi yezonyango, senze ukuba kwenzeke ukuzibandakanya nabantu be-AI abaphefumlelwe ngamasiko okuphilisa avela kwihlabathi liphela-kubandakanya iinkqubo zaseMpuma kunye nezaseAfrika ezihlala zingananzwa. Asikhuthazi nayiphi na indlela enye. Endaweni yoko, sinikezela ngezixhobo ezivumela abantu ukuba baphonononge uluhlu lwemibono kwaye badibanise eyona nto baziva inentsingiselo kubo.
founders.paragraph4: Siyaqonda ukuba le ndlela iya kuhlangabezana nokuxhathisa. Ezinye zazo ziya kusebenza—iinkxalabo malunga nokuchaneka ziyinyaniso, yaye sizithabatha nzulu. Okunye ukugxekwa kuya kuvela ekunganeliseki lutshintsho. Kodwa ukhathalelo lwempilo luyavela, nokuba isiseko siyayamkela okanye hayi. Injongo yethu kukukhokela olo tshintsho ngenkathalo, ngokuthobeka, nangokungafihlisiyo.
founders.paragraph5: I-AI inamandla, kodwa ayifezekanga. Ezi ayizozinto ezisemthethweni kuphela-ziyinxalenye yoxanduva lwethu olusesikweni kuwe nakwimpilo yoluntu. Nceda usebenzise esi sixhobo njengesongezelelo, hayi indawo, kukhathalelo lwezonyango olunelayisensi.
founders.closing: Enkosi ngokuba lapha. Siyathemba ukuba uyayisebenzisa usempilweni entle.
founders.supportText: Ukuba uyakholelwa kule nto siyakhayo kwaye ufuna ukusinceda siyiqhube, siyayidinga inkxaso yakho. Unganegalelo ngokucofa kwikhonkco elingezantsi.
